name: Nikki Haley
subject: Democrats always blame America first
body:
Last year I spoke at the Republican National Convention, and the words I spoke to the American people then still ring true today: “Democrats always bl [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FBs4lW323-3c6mFogyLRoi5a1WXuV945K_jYBVBAk9PX94xEoG3VNPNEx4QNpS0O1ns7OExuM8Jwsy0AKimQtLKyUoPy8pgv3a1rtvozhxwfuui5AdjHdHxGUaxrZ-K19WSouFWfePrVS4gmLOl-UyHMcdW3hPXFeZoRmvjBWvVbeQKzUTMA0mIHBK5pQeNsOiQedDk7oE8QN1pQZevxwvE%3D) Fellow Conservative,
Last year I spoke at the Republican National Convention, and the words I spoke to the American people then still ring true today: **_“Democrats always _blame_ America first.”_**
...And they always put America last.
Well, Joe Biden and the Democrats are _still_ blaming America first...and they’re _still****_ putting America last.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $20 right now to stop Biden, Harris, and the rest of the Democrats from continuing to put our country last.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FIUphqPc3UTbyOZH0LnoTZ15TmW4gVThNjuEgxIfj6OEXxE_To0Dd0hLjH4KYihjlYWv9_yHkDOVDiA4n6Sx-HpdPrBJvWqb22tnewVAclvnZnM5X_Du4539cFV3Ehdy9_fuXfANlxXVIf-0ZDbFgdT_v2CJQfRojSuoAA8koqz9uatEY4-gWFy9f18RAeZNtFwGHiK77Fs5x4MxZa78Wj0%3D) [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FGOipar-p1bjy37yzRZDHABRnGOSbR7LxCHe0RxyfxCMO2CQh8klpUoLJKGxdjNThvZPVTfI-ryjhXTezeWam4aRwSKKHX_BTTxnQm-_68gK_hmk5IhCRdk9EgSsHblbqqW3g62KsBg7BZhZ8IgGTONAeUV9umq1Qx-iNidw41MB4DLJ48CxcknIFKCYwA9Et05zL8FmInFv5bAHs2zzLVg%3D) You’ve seen Biden do this, and you’ve seen the Democrats in Congress let him get away with it. The most liberal president our country has ever seen keeps blaming America for the failed policies of the Left.
[**Will you stand with me and stand with America today with a special $20 donation to Stand For America PAC so we can elect conservatives who will counter Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FHTcUxZhDy7Gb_JXTmMPj7A7WOeUu0ks1LoJutY5mVEMWcMPJo9eznsf9RhHfhvMJGiS5RQjqEwXMPBbsJ9ldlshXeQwXmRLRQiWFHpiNetj7WkniHCRRs6-1QULVMNd43BcVXJm1QgBd3pv9cKuU77BapMPy_ADFN_CzhxGtyqwnKCKDJVa16JHhl62jSFeGjT9Hj95xQHHL8PUOZA3-nM%3D)
Over the last few months we’ve seen Joe Biden and the radical Left tear apart our country, our economy, and threaten our way of life. [SUPPORT STAND FOR AMERICA PAC RIGHT NOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FE9_nOemaKg6thlur0MvZYOsfnvuRJB7z_lYmwQqWE1AMtKU6uO01XZxt5HIKAzsLAe54Q2cXBCtZDB3DEoqJ_-TLOnMI691RrDM4EYq9DqAm329HZphGMR7TowbJBezeBiO-RaSeRzWc2gRbADoQsHVB9opNeHQZnpTwJ8qczM_KW2JaGTjXWOnxPUqBqmOD0vlkFq-Pcmqwf-vqCETkgg%3D) Over the past few months they have:
* Proposed $6 trillion in new spending and a massive government expansion – the largest our country has seen in half a century.
* Caved to our adversaries. They want to "partner" with China on climate change and are ready to give upfront sanctions relief to the Iranian regime that spreads terrorism.
* Failed to re-open schools and given in to critical race theory in the classroom.
* Pushed ahead with H.R. 1/S.R. 1, an elections bill that should be called the “Corrupt Politicians Act.” It's a liberal power grab that would hand over our elections to Washington and make them less secure.
* Threatened to “pack” the Supreme Court – to add more liberal justices ensuring conservative policies don’t have a fair chance in our legal system.

I won’t...** _I can’t_** ...stand for that.
Because this country became strong by putting the American people _**first**_. _Not last._
**All my life, we’ve been a country that stood UP for America, and stood AGAINST our enemies.**
I’ve always put America first. That’s what I did as South Carolina’s governor, it’s what I did protecting America against our enemies at the United Nations – and it’s what I’m doing right now – working to elect as many conservatives as possible to Congress in the 2022 midterm elections.
That’s why I founded Stand For America PAC. And it’s why I’m so passionate about finding conservatives like you to join me.
[**Will you stand with me, and stand for America today with a special $20 donation to Stand For America PAC?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FI6etQ_-Em3e5VhpN9ibFH9GdN9KeOIUKJFMdPVdWsYRuZC2nhqm0k5TqqyPFm_sBMP35YBSx9Rae0zHaOZ9Fq_SXDXpzqkqBcum2qgnp_1PMM3MgzxezuV-rPdCtQGpuKL6QZk7IgcYZhmHXfGjsp8E_uVuCImNI6IBatGOOaQmxEOq46RuLRwEmJw74WjOYas9Q0IUNlb_Eht6lqmFKs8%3D) [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FOD_qbdPOjd9Z5nCCRB95Sh4ULWAiOmH34-X9p8ejJWbqgm8DxmoWvMGF29-8LosrZpdwu5S3q5BPycTF8P68ax5UQ3g5hl85Ty1y7cUTEh_lEskT8BVtI4X8J3yUeZStUPI7Qvz6DFDgDefQTtk8BUs05ucdmmfUsSHl818aty1UBbnLGIVnO2l25J3B5pcnzgeS0W2l4O9j174T6XEhKg%3D) Joe Biden keeps apologizing for America.
That’s good for Iran and ISIS... great for Communist China... and a blessing for anyone who wants America to abstain and abandon our values. **But bad for us.**
We need a different approach.
It’s time for Americans all across the country to say “enough” and support conservative leaders in Congress who will put the American people first.
[**Will you join me and stand UP for America, and stand AGAINST our enemies with a $20 donation to Stand For America PAC today?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FEs-ivSfnSK1Tc9uaO5rN7lOKPuvNTfcynwIzFY5vHJShMYOeohEIwElSW1ZNN99FQFDYNJkjPQzsfusOF9sYZZvZFcztIGThNYaJ435Dwg8xXHXgNZadOzg_Op6vPf7XXxR-e8ijEszy_FqlcSScSNZi20LU470Qp1yblSEvfgxnUd_1IewbRwu5ao9mojCLYM1L14ya6ALhYxN9HyZyjc%3D)
Thank you for your support.
My very best, [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4e67c65fa33746f39e219d860e2b78dd&_e=ppJrwoe0rhzFXwj1LZPxRa8OwCCZc2ZyVJ1W5QSEYZDwOHzdklTOzNF1OSS4kVlCc7GtLJD1-WZ8cPee5rx2UOiPXhIPOGs6H08cHG4q3AJqhH4Nj4so5jH2zce51k4I42OJG9yTeL4zZRYK8bRlNoLT6b_eOm3NFbAbdyCGybZvhnJhKt8EyJoHcNZNoT_DTbrvyRagth0SkJM9mAY7FBFhy2U4lKQAWzu-9-Jb3fwiUXnBrp5LS6uzTJmpwuakfDGvrmQQaufKdxKyFM3wn1FBpOePdCKp0F-l9v6ZC7uRpaL93VTXNPeYKSNDaC4qV8RLd7gfXMwMwTFqV4I02xFdq4yc9jgMz7R6rVLyYcnf7uCyAZBnfd8NskFM0KkUPiG8wR6bLv6o1IwzGd1MqDhFFR4E3pj6I7F2Yjtr-04%3D) Nikki R. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: The Gazelka Sellout
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **The Gazelka Sellout is happening!** Weak "Republican" Majority Leader Paul Gazelka and Walz did a [press conference this morning](https://www.action4liberty.com/the_gazelka_sellout_budget_deal_with_walz?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=2) proclaiming they had an agreement on how much of your money they plan to spend in the next two years. Not surprisingly, the deal grows government by BILLIONS. And it funds Walz' government agencies to attack our businesses. **But they stopped short of announcing that Walz' Emergency Powers would be terminated and the Never Again Bill will be passed into law.** It's because of these weak, feckless Republicans like Gazelka and Republican Senators that we continue to choke on a massive growth in government without passing the [**Never Again Bill**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=3). Clearly Gazelka is not actually serious about fighting for freedom and conservatives. **However, the budget bills have not been inked yet.** And that's because of YOU! **Your phone calls, emails and donations have made a significant impact. If you did nothing, Gazelka would've cowered to Walz months ago. But now he is treading lightly and we can't let up!** They adjourned Sine Die (meaning, the session is over). Anything further is done in a Special Session. If you remember, we set the goal to Stop the Budget until the **Never Again Bill** is passed. With your help we were successful on the first half of our goal. We Stopped the Budget...for now. Next step is to get them to pass the Never Again Bill and End Walz' Emergency Powers. The good thing with Stopping the Budget now is that we still have even more time to pressure senators to get the Never Again Bill passed. Our insiders at the Capitol tell us that they'll be back on June 14th for the final showdown. So we don't have a lot of time. We MUST stop the Gazelka Sellout from happening! **Action 4 Liberty is happy to report that we'll be hiring nine young liberty professionals this summer to double down on our efforts. And we're putting the finishing touches on our brand new headquarters, which greatly enhances our ability to take the fight to the corrupt politicians. Please help us continue this fight!** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=4 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=5)
---
Walz' plan is to keep his Emergency Powers as long as he can, which opens the door to vaccine passports.
He's already talking about forcing masks on people who aren't vaccinated. How would he know who isn't vaccinated without an identification system?
So if Walz isn't stopped now by Gazelka and the Republicans, we are in for a bumpy ride.
**That's why it's more critical than ever that you get into this battle in every way possible.**
* Call & [email your senator](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=6) and tell him or her NO BUDGET until the Never Again Bill is law. Even if you've already done it. Do it again.
* Tell everyone you know to sign the End Emergency Powers petition [**HERE**](https://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=7) to get more people in this fight.
* **[Donate to the effort](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=8)** so we can hire more liberty fighters on the ground everywhere in Minnesota.

Of course Walz' push is all anti-science, anti-data.
Florida and Texas haven't been mandating masks for months and they are doing great! Shouldn't we see the bodies of the unvaccinated Floridians and Texans lying on the streets?!
This COVID Con by Walz has gone on long enough. And I'm afraid that Unilateral Emergency Powers won't only be used for this current pandemic.
If Gazelka sells out and doesn't pass the **Never Again Bill** , Walz can abuse emergency powers again for gasoline shortages, flu breakouts and the inevitable future civil unrest in the metro.
**We at Action 4 Liberty are making long term investments RIGHT NOW to protect liberty for our next generations. Our team continues to see Unilateral Emergency Powers as the biggest threat to liberty. So we are doubling down.**
Hiring young, liberty professionals to work the phones, get out and door knock and run our operations means we bring a bigger fight to the table.
But I cannot do it alone. I need YOU in this fight now more than ever.
_We WILL NOT let Walz continue his reign of Unilateral Emergency Powers anymore._
[**Peter, help my team make more phone calls and boost up our ads in the weeks ahead. Let's ELIMINATE Walz' Emergency Powers! Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to keep the pressure on politicians in St Paul.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gazelka_sellout&n=9)
Thank you for your continued support!
With your help, we can end these abusive Emergency Powers once and for all and pass the Never Again Bill into law.
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**

clean_body: | Peter \-- The Gazelka Sellout is happening! Weak "Republican" Majority Leader Paul Gazelka and Walz did a proclaiming they had an agreement on how much of your money they plan to spend in the next two years. Not surprisingly, the deal grows government by BILLIONS. And it funds Walz' government agencies to attack our businesses. But they stopped short of announcing that Walz' Emergency Powers would be terminated and the Never Again Bill will be passed into law. It's because of these weak, feckless Republicans like Gazelka and Republican Senators that we continue to choke on a massive growth in government without passing the . Clearly Gazelka is not actually serious about fighting for freedom and conservatives. However, the budget bills have not been inked yet. And that's because of YOU! Your phone calls, emails and donations have made a significant impact. If you did nothing, Gazelka would've cowered to Walz months ago. But now he is treading lightly and we can't let up! They adjourned Sine Die (meaning, the session is over). Anything further is done in a Special Session. If you remember, we set the goal to Stop the Budget until the Never Again Bill is passed. With your help we were successful on the first half of our goal. We Stopped the Budget...for now. Next step is to get them to pass the Never Again Bill and End Walz' Emergency Powers. The good thing with Stopping the Budget now is that we still have even more time to pressure senators to get the Never Again Bill passed. Our insiders at the Capitol tell us that they'll be back on June 14th for the final showdown. So we don't have a lot of time. We MUST stop the Gazelka Sellout from happening! Action 4 Liberty is happy to report that we'll be hiring nine young liberty professionals this summer to double down on our efforts. And we're putting the finishing touches on our brand new headquarters, which greatly enhances our ability to take the fight to the corrupt politicians. Please help us continue this fight! | "DONATE NOW!" Walz' plan is to keep his Emergency Powers as long as he can, which opens the door to vaccine passports. He's already talking about forcing masks on people who aren't vaccinated. How would he know who isn't vaccinated without an identification system? So if Walz isn't stopped now by Gazelka and the Republicans, we are in for a bumpy ride. That's why it's more critical than ever that you get into this battle in every way possible. Call & and tell him or her NO BUDGET until the Never Again Bill is law. Even if you've already done it. Do it again. Tell everyone you know to sign the End Emergency Powers petition to get more people in this fight. so we can hire more liberty fighters on the ground everywhere in Minnesota. Of course Walz' push is all anti-science, anti-data. Florida and Texas haven't been mandating masks for months and they are doing great! Shouldn't we see the bodies of the unvaccinated Floridians and Texans lying on the streets?! This COVID Con by Walz has gone on long enough. And I'm afraid that Unilateral Emergency Powers won't only be used for this current pandemic. If Gazelka sells out and doesn't pass the Never Again Bill , Walz can abuse emergency powers again for gasoline shortages, flu breakouts and the inevitable future civil unrest in the metro. We at Action 4 Liberty are making long term investments RIGHT NOW to protect liberty for our next generations. Our team continues to see Unilateral Emergency Powers as the biggest threat to liberty. So we are doubling down. Hiring young, liberty professionals to work the phones, get out and door knock and run our operations means we bring a bigger fight to the table. But I cannot do it alone. I need YOU in this fight now more than ever. We WILL NOT let Walz continue his reign of Unilateral Emergency Powers anymore. Thank you for your continued support! With your help, we can end these abusive Emergency Powers once and for all and pass the Never Again Bill into law. In Liberty, Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113 Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Taxing the rich, explained.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Tax Day 2021 is here. Let’s talk about why we need to reshape our economy.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210517-2085-header&t=1&akid=2085%2E2526796%2EDotMUz)
Today is officially Tax Day, so we want to go into a little more detail on what exactly we mean when we say "tax the rich." Our leaders have historically taken the opposite approach: cutting taxes for the rich and expecting wealth to "trickle down" to the rest of us (spoiler alert: it doesn't).
As we work to reshape our economy and make it work for everyone — not just the people at the top — taxing the rich is the clear and necessary solution.
### **So, why do we need to tax the rich?**
* **The super rich pay lower taxes than the poorest Americans.** The United States has a regressive tax system in which the richest people actually pay lower effective tax rates across all levels of government than the poorest people in our country. Seems hard to believe, right? But it’s true.1

* **Taxes on the rich are much lower than they used to be.** Check out this graph from _The New York Times_ comparing rates from 1950 to 2018.2

* **Two men — Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos — own more wealth than the bottom 40% of Americans combined. 3**
* **During the pandemic, U.S. billionaires saw their wealth go up 55% from $2.95 trillion to $4.56 trillion.** Just the gains they made over the last year of this pandemic alone could pay for almost 70% of Biden’s jobs plan.4
* **U.S. income inequality has returned to Gilded Age levels from the early 1900s.** Our inequality levels are the highest of all G7 countries (UK, Italy, Japan, Canada, Germany, France).5,6
* **CEOs at large companies in the U.S. now make an astonishing 264 times what the average U.S. worker makes.** 7 In 1989, the ratio was 58-to-1, and in 1965, it was 20-to-1.8
* **Polls show Americans don’t believe the rich pay their fair share, but Republicans keep lowering their taxes.** Gallup polls as far back as 1992 have shown that the vast majority of Americans want to tax the rich more.9 Even then, Presidents Bush and Trump pushed through massive tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans.

### Are you fired up and ready to tax the rich?
Good — because we can’t win this fight without grassroots activism and organizing. **If you know someone who might benefit from reading the facts above, please forward them this email.** If we can unite the working people of this country, we can tax the rich, close the inequality gap, and bring about a just economy for all of us.
– Team AOC

clean_body: Tax Day 2021 is here. Let’s talk about why we need to reshape our economy. Today is officially Tax Day, so we want to go into a little more detail on what exactly we mean when we say "tax the rich." Our leaders have historically taken the opposite approach: cutting taxes for the rich and expecting wealth to "trickle down" to the rest of us (spoiler alert: it doesn't). As we work to reshape our economy and make it work for everyone — not just the people at the top — taxing the rich is the clear and necessary solution. So, why do we need to tax the rich? The super rich pay lower taxes than the poorest Americans. The United States has a regressive tax system in which the richest people actually pay lower effective tax rates across all levels of government than the poorest people in our country. Seems hard to believe, right? But it’s true.1 Taxes on the rich are much lower than they used to be. Check out this graph from The New York Times comparing rates from 1950 to 2018.2 Two men — Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos — own more wealth than the bottom 40% of Americans combined. 3 During the pandemic, U.S. billionaires saw their wealth go up 55% from $2.95 trillion to $4.56 trillion. Just the gains they made over the last year of this pandemic alone could pay for almost 70% of Biden’s jobs plan.4 U.S. income inequality has returned to Gilded Age levels from the early 1900s. Our inequality levels are the highest of all G7 countries (UK, Italy, Japan, Canada, Germany, France).5,6 CEOs at large companies in the U.S. now make an astonishing 264 times what the average U.S. worker makes. 7 In 1989, the ratio was 58-to-1, and in 1965, it was 20-to-1.8 Polls show Americans don’t believe the rich pay their fair share, but Republicans keep lowering their taxes. Gallup polls as far back as 1992 have shown that the vast majority of Americans want to tax the rich more.9 Even then, Presidents Bush and Trump pushed through massive tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans. Are you fired up and ready to tax the rich? Good — because we can’t win this fight without grassroots activism and organizing. If you know someone who might benefit from reading the facts above, please forward them this email. If we can unite the working people of this country, we can tax the rich, close the inequality gap, and bring about a just economy for all of us. – Team AOC P.S. You can also show your support with a "Tax the Rich" shirt or hoodie — 100% of proceeds help fund Team AOC’s critical grassroots organizing and campaigning. 1 - - 3 - 4 - 5 - 6 - 7 - 8 - 9 - | | Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Senate Update
subject: No Moving On
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Every time you hear someone in the media say
Republicans have to "move on from Donald Trump," they really mean
move on from YOU.

They want to "move on"... from the heroes who:

✅ Won conservatives historic victories,
✅ Started to build our Border Wall,✅ Put three
conservative judges on the Supreme Court,✅ Helped create the
most robust economy in American history, and✅ Exposed Big Tech
and woke corporations' anti-American cancel culture for the sham
it is.

That's really what the media wants us to "move on"
from. And every time they say it, ESTABLISHMENT REPUBLICANS
QUIETLY AGREE. They know that if the GOP remains the party of
America First conservatives, they will lose complete control.

And that is exactly what Senate Conservatives Fund
has in mind!

The 2022 election cycle is a HUGE test for
conservative patriots across America. We have to prove that our
ideas, message, and candidates are the GOP's future. At SCF,
we're not "moving on." We're moving IN.

The fight for the Senate has already begun, and SCF
is already on the ground in key Republican Senate primary
battles.

Three rock-solid conservatives - Josh Mandel in
Ohio, Mo Brooks in Alabama, and Ted Budd in North Carolina - will
face Establishment candidates in tight races that will determine
the trajectory of the GOP in 2022 and beyond. They have
courageous conservative records, proven MAGA guts, and broad
support among grassroots conservatives in their states and across
the country.

Mandel, Brooks, and Budd are SCF's first three
endorsed candidates for this critical election cycle. And now we
need your help to send as much early money into their races as
possible.

Please help us send a message to the Washington
Establishment by contributing $25, $50, $100, or more to SCF
today!

Beltway Republicans want to hand-pick their
candidates for these races. They want to win control of the
Senate and get back to the "bad old days" before President Trump
when they were in charge.

They need to know we're never "going back," and
we're never "moving on." And the only way to make them understand
is to win these primary fights with our candidates,
contributions, and principles.

Republican voters want real conservative fighters in
the Senate, not more of the Swamp Surrender Caucus.

Please help us prepare the Senate battleground for
2022 with a generous contribution to SCF TODAY!

Senate Conservatives Fund is the only organization
exclusively committed to electing proven, fighting conservatives
to the U.S. Senate. With the 2022 midterm elections just around
the corner, Beltway Republicans are waiting for conservatives to
give up or let up - so they can get back in the driver's seat.

We can't let that happen.

With your contribution today, together, we'll make
sure it doesn't.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

subject: Reauthorize the Violence Against Women Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29355334/286138994/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGMwNGE1Ni1lMWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P3b3nbBbjSWmclDYTZjCh9C3K3VtYCQSMYkhw-EFHLo=&emci=cb8a67af-27b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=ddc04a56-e1b7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18185356)

| | I'm tired of talking about 'Violence Against Women', Peter. It's a euphemism. A dodge. A passive phrase that sounds like 'violence' just _happens_ spontaneously, with no one responsible. **Let's stop talking in code._Violence against women is a tragedy caused almost exclusively by men._** Throughout our nation's history, men have ignored, marginalized, infantilized, patronized, dismissed, mocked, oppressed, and abused women and girls – often explicitly and as a matter of policy and law. **And it's only going to get fixed when we step up and commit to making things right.** And that's why I and the folks in our movement are so disgusted both by Congressional politicians who let the Violence Against Women Act expire during the Trump administration and by the Senate that has yet to renew it. [**Join me in this fight. Sign the petition and urge the Senate to reauthorize the Violence Against Women Act immediately.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29355335/286138997/-1071318912?source=2021VAWA_JM&referrer=group-john-mcguigan-for-pennsylvania&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-john-mcguigan-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2021-05-vawa-senate-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGMwNGE1Ni1lMWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P3b3nbBbjSWmclDYTZjCh9C3K3VtYCQSMYkhw-EFHLo=&emci=cb8a67af-27b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=ddc04a56-e1b7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18185356) [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29355337/286138998/-1071318912?source=2021VAWA_JM&referrer=group-john-mcguigan-for-pennsylvania&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-john-mcguigan-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2021-05-vawa-senate-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGMwNGE1Ni1lMWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P3b3nbBbjSWmclDYTZjCh9C3K3VtYCQSMYkhw-EFHLo=&emci=cb8a67af-27b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=ddc04a56-e1b7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18185356) Men, we have to be better: better husbands, partners, fathers, sons, brothers, employees, customers, employers, friends, fans. Everything. We can start by recognizing that the same entrenched power that enables some men to abuse women can be used to stop _any_ man from abusing women. We have to change the messages we send to our boys and the lessons we teach them. We have to listen to the women in our lives and in our movement and offer support – not heroism, not rescue, not protection, just a commitment to building the future our communities deserve. This doesn't exactly take wild creativity or moral courage or bold leadership, Peter. Just humility, responsibility, and a willingness to serve others. **And yet, our elected leaders still can't seem to get anywhere with it.** Let's show them how it's done. [**Peter, please join me in telling the US Senate to _do their job_ and reauthorize the Violence Against Women Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29355339/286139000/-1071318912?source=2021VAWA_JM&referrer=group-john-mcguigan-for-pennsylvania&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-john-mcguigan-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2021-05-vawa-senate-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGMwNGE1Ni1lMWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P3b3nbBbjSWmclDYTZjCh9C3K3VtYCQSMYkhw-EFHLo=&emci=cb8a67af-27b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=ddc04a56-e1b7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=18185356) | Over the last several years, Big Tech oligarchs in Silicon Valley have used the power of their multi-billion dollar companies to...
* **Silence** Conservative voices
* **Censor** anyone who disagrees with their far-left narrative
* **Cancel** Conservative influencers, pundits, and speakers
* **Fuel** leftist propaganda and fake news

They've aligned themselves with "woke" politicians and their socialist agenda and have done everything they can to boot Conservatives off the internet for good.

So allow us to introduce you to Caucus Room, **_[a social media platform created for Conservatives just like you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57422614:Jw9zNplNJ:m:1:3206719985:6564917AC3B1DB259AD5F6219C9569AB:r "a social media platform created for Conservatives just like you. ")_**

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Join me in helping one of my heroes tonight: Tammy Duckworth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

The veterans of Taking the Hill are proud to launch our 2022 US Senate slate with a big, virtual rally celebrating our [first endorsement of the cycle: **Senator Tammy Duckworth!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/neyrc2z8h4mtTsbjzgoGNYEXzt8PuNPI2zX8gjKUEu0=/GG6DchaoVK7A4uK1aNybRImaEI53x4pySPdFIqury1M=)

And personally, Tammy has been a hero of mine for a long time. She's a fellow soldier and a wounded warrior who has been a tireless advocate for all veterans. As a parent, her advocacy for working mothers on the floor of the US Senate has been incredible. We need more people like Tammy in the Senate - that's why I'm working hard to make sure she gets re-elected!

It would make me so proud if we could "pack the Zoom" tonight to cheer on Senator Duckworth and celebrate her service. [_**This link will take you to a page where you can purchase a ticket. Will you join me today in showing Tammy that we have her back?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/neyrc2z8h4mtTsbjzgoGNYEXzt8PuNPI2zX8gjKUEu0=/GG6DchaoVK7A4uK1aNybRImaEI53x4pySPdFIqury1M=)

([_**We are still looking for 2 more people to sponsor this event at the Champion level or above ($2,500)**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/neyrc2z8h4mtTsbjzgoGNYEXzt8PuNPI2zX8gjKUEu0=/GG6DchaoVK7A4uK1aNybRImaEI53x4pySPdFIqury1M=) \- _we 'll thank you publicly at the event and give you the chance to engage with the Senator afterwards!_)

[**Date: Tuesday, May 18th
Time: 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm Eastern
Location: Zoom!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/neyrc2z8h4mtTsbjzgoGNYEXzt8PuNPI2zX8gjKUEu0=/GG6DchaoVK7A4uK1aNybRImaEI53x4pySPdFIqury1M=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/neyrc2z8h4mtTsbjzgoGNYEXzt8PuNPI2zX8gjKUEu0=/GG6DchaoVK7A4uK1aNybRImaEI53x4pySPdFIqury1M=)

Let's show up for Senator Duckworth. See you tonight!

In solidarity,

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Fmr Congressman (PA-01)
[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/neyrc2z8h4mtTsbjzgoGNYEXzt8PuNPI2zX8gjKUEu0=/8M7kxwP2gWj9hthA83O9kdGa2Q58c82gyzRBhTBWdZ8=)

Paid for by Taking the Hill
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/neyrc2z8h4mtTsbjzgoGNYEXzt8PuNPI2zX8gjKUEu0=/Wek3mmf6e_gbpdA6N3vcFKVV5tJhiWTZuPirOTQSfD8=).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh?=
subject: Murphy Rejects CDC Guidance
body:
Even Andrew Cuomo and Bill DeBlasio are ending mask mandates | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hirshsingh/murphy-wont-follow-the-science-418104?e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=89b520d240&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend, Phil Murphy has made it official: he won’t follow the science.

Instead, Murphy is scheming to continue unconstitutional mask mandates and draconian lockdowns.

While liberals like Andrew Cuomo and Bill DeBlasio are ending mask mandates in New York, Murphy refuses to give up the control and power that comes with regulating our lives.

[Let’s throw Phil Murphy out of office](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=359d882276&e=3e017fab0f):
* End the mask mandates!

* End the lockdowns!

* Prohibit forced vaccinations!

* Pardon everyone charged with a no-mask "crime"!

I’m running for Governor to restore our state to its rightful place as a global leader in industry, innovation, and individual freedom.

In short, [I’m running for Governor to save New Jersey from Phil Murphy](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=fbf64a553b&e=3e017fab0f).

The people of New Jersey are ready for a leader who trusts them to safely re-open and who won’t cave to the radical left, Trenton RINOs, or Washington politicians.

I’ll be a leader who empowers the people — not the government — to make the best health decisions they can for themselves.

And, on Day One, I’ll unleash the full economic potential of our people and our state to re-open and rebuild.

You can help me get there. [Join our team today](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=13819b6c75&e=3e017fab0f).
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Make New Jersey Great Again

---
| PS: If Phil Murphy won’t reopen New Jersey now and empower We the People, I will. But establishment hacks in Trenton and Washington are spending millions smearing my good name. [I’ve proven I’m not afraid of the fight, but I need your help to stand up to them and win](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=40054fb49b&e=3e017fab0f). Join our team now.

**-Hirsh**
---
|

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29361766/286161905/-2023814932?refcode=20210518_VA_5AY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTE1OTVhMi1lZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KuHdSBp3nk-CZeNOa2vM82yWIJnnrTF3jjF3AFmAOOo=)

| | Derek,

Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ called it “the most competitive race of 2021.” The Cook Political Report said Glenn Youngkin’s nomination should be “encouraging news for Republicans.” **And now, The Washington Post has said Youngkin has a “surprisingly good chance” of winning the Governor’s office.**

Derek, expert after expert is making it perfectly clear: Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate has a real shot at becoming Virginia’s next Governor.

**[Will you donate right now so Terry has the resources he needs to stop Glenn Youngkin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29361767/286161906/-2023814932?refcode=20210518_VA_5AY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTE1OTVhMi1lZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KuHdSBp3nk-CZeNOa2vM82yWIJnnrTF3jjF3AFmAOOo=)**

Virginia played a crucial role in firing Donald Trump in 2020, but make no mistake -- Glenn Youngkin is doing everything he can to bring Trumpism back.

He bought the Republican primary and now he says he’s willing to spend **$75 million of his own fortune to buy the Governor’s office.**

No wonder _The Washington Post_ said, “Democrats will err if they take this race for granted.”

This race is going to be close all the way until Election Day. Democrats have to get to work right now if we want to have a chance to win.

**[Will you chip in now to help us fight against their extremist agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29361768/286161907/-2023814932?refcode=20210518_VA_5AY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTE1OTVhMi1lZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KuHdSBp3nk-CZeNOa2vM82yWIJnnrTF3jjF3AFmAOOo=)** | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29361769/286161908/-2023814932?refcode=20210518_VA_5AY&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTE1OTVhMi1lZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KuHdSBp3nk-CZeNOa2vM82yWIJnnrTF3jjF3AFmAOOo=)

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight called it “the most competitive race of 2021.” The Cook Political Report said Glenn Youngkin’s nomination should be “encouraging news for Republicans.” And now, The Washington Post has said Youngkin has a “surprisingly good chance” of winning the Governor’s office. Derek, expert after expert is making it perfectly clear: Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate has a real shot at becoming Virginia’s next Governor. = Virginia played a crucial role in firing Donald Trump in 2020, but make no mistake -- Glenn Youngkin is doing everything he can to bring Trumpism back. He bought the Republican primary and now he says he’s willing to spend $75 million of his own fortune to buy the Governor’s office. No wonder The Washington Post said, “Democrats will err if they take this race for granted.” This race is going to be close all the way until Election Day. Democrats have to get to work right now if we want to have a chance to win. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We still have a chance, but we need our grassroots team to step up now more than ever. Can we count on your support? \-- Team Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: hate to share bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
I hate to share bad news, but you deserve the truth. Our team missed our mid-quarter grassroots fundraising goal on Saturday.
These things happen, but when they do, it's really important that we catch up quickly.
Hitting our grassroots fundraising goals is key to funding our strategy to build a huge coalition of working people behind our movement for health care, green union jobs, climate action, voting rights, and so much more.
And when we miss those goals, we have to make difficult decisions about where to cut back on our budget.
**But we don't want to have to do that. And thanks to a big surge of support yesterday, we’re about where we need to be. If just a few more folks step up, we’ll cross the finish line in no time.**
[So, friend, I'm personally asking for your support today to help us fill the final gap. If you're able, can I count on you to pitch in $3 to put our grassroots fundraising back on track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29364426/286169004/-347207331?refcode2=5d95c2af-f2b7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210518-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDk1YzJhZi1mMmI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5XeExeSRMsHjHVFK2VMStK-6Q9ymTW7PtVSEHKLNxn4=)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: My birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

From the bottom of my heart, thank you. As I reflect on all that I’m grateful for today — my 34th birthday — I am especially grateful to have you fighting alongside me in our people-powered movement.
Over the past year, this movement defied the odds and made history by electing me the first openly gay, Black member of Congress. Together, we’ve proven the naysayers wrong and hit the ground running, shaken up the status quo, delivered bold relief for American families, and showed people in power that Congress must do more.
And here’s the thing: _we’re just getting started._
I’m taking a moment to celebrate today, but I’m also hard at work fighting for our progressive values and preparing for re-election. Redistricting is just a few months away. **[Can you make a contribution of $34 — or whatever you can afford — to ensure we can keep up this fight for working people in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29365343/286172714/-13329713?refcode2=774bd395-f4b7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210518-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzRiZDM5NS1mNGI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_S-Dtgfdb_-BlELUFi2M8ndZBL8JHttvyQcS9-GLnc=)**

Thank you again for your ongoing support. Representing the American people is an honor I did not believe possible until a few years ago.
I’m going to keep fighting for all of us.
Onward,

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: This could be a devastating blow to reproductive justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw the news, Peter.

When Senate Republicans rushed to confirm anti-choice Justice Amy Coney Barrett last October, we worried about the future of _Roe v. Wade_. And yesterday, news broke that the Supreme Court of the United States will be hearing a direct challenge to _Roe v. Wade_ when they hear Mississippi's restrictive abortion ban.

This is about reproductive justice. It's critical that we preserve reproductive rights that have been protected under the constitution since the _Roe v. Wade_ decision in 1973.

Peter, I want to be clear: I have always been guided by the key principle that decisions about health care are best made by a patient in consultation with their doctors. These deeply personal decisions should not be interfered with or replaced by the judgment of politicians.

**[SCOTUS's ruling for this case could have a devastating impact on reproductive justice. So, we have to take action now. Will you reaffirm your support for _Roe v. Wade_? Please add your name next to mine.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WitBz1TyV8gWOj9CDs19uwq6mW8AfKNkFlKzNhPLxhE=/67gbkRGkk5Ur5BunR2QJFnYvWv6AyrLHfwZJobCSAow=?gpsid=50_115_18943&ms=em21_210518_Roe_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210518_Roe_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210518_Roe_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

People have counted on _Roe_ 's legal protections for decades. It's critical that we remain vigilant by opposing any proposals that would limit care options for women or threaten people's health and even lives.

No matter what happens at the judicial level, we need pro-choice champions in Congress. It's why I will keep fighting to elect more pro-choice Democratic lawmakers who will fight by my side to make sure women have access to the care they need -- no matter who they are or where they live.

**[Reproductive care is health care. Add your name next to mine to reaffirm your support for _Roe v. Wade_.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WitBz1TyV8gWOj9CDs19uwq6mW8AfKNkFlKzNhPLxhE=/67gbkRGkk5Ur5BunR2QJFnYvWv6AyrLHfwZJobCSAow=?gpsid=50_115_18943&ms=em21_210518_Roe_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210518_Roe_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210518_Roe_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/WitBz1TyV8gWOj9CDs19uwq6mW8AfKNkFlKzNhPLxhE=/3u_cXbIW2x5KMeYQz3IlkdPlpsd7-2R7PU2Bjz0XMzI=?gpsid=50_115_18945&refcode=em21_210518_Roe_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210518_Roe_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

name: Tax the Rich (LeftAction)
subject: Tell Republicans: "No, raising taxes on the rich won't unleash the zombie apocalypse"
body:
Republicans spent the last several decades in an orgiastic frenzy of slashing taxes for the wealthy, and now it's time to restore some basic fairness.
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/raisetaxesonthewealthyhellyes1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | | Hi Friend, **_(Let the Republicans complain all they want --[ It's time to raise taxes on the rich](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb106434-79ed-406d-9a5d-0821dd8c0c80/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) _**
### **[Sign: "Hell Yes, we should raise taxes on the rich!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te59ff24c-9783-48a3-8d82-fe656925b569/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
Republicans spent the last several decades in an orgiastic frenzy of slashing taxes for the wealthy, and now they’re screaming bloody murder because Democrats want to restore some fairness. **“The wealthy will stop trickling down! Armageddon will follow! Maybe even zombies! ZOMBIES!!!”** **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a3e8a61-ee1e-4b1b-ac27-91ac71077954/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Let them scream. And let us scream right back: [**“You’re damn right we’re going to make the wealthy pay more!”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcef94360-9026-429f-9ec4-71a7a8758b36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s the right thing to do, it’s the fair thing to do, and if Republicans don’t like it, well... you know where they can go. [**Add your name, show your support, and shout it out with us: “Raise taxes on the wealthy? Hell Yes!”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabad0cf1-4a3f-4966-b6bc-505ba781e567/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team Bass
subject: Here's what's in the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act (from the team of the Congressmember who actually wrote it):
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
_From community organizing in South Los Angeles to becoming the first-ever African American woman to preside over a state legislature, Congressmember Karen Bass has a proven track record of fighting for working families. You 're receiving this email because of your support for leaders like her. However, if you don't want to be part of our team, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OdXptrNND8C3oy6sIh258B-RiTjHyoPAqYhTKOBkUg=/AThMDt0SHQ0AHMVd7UG08PrcH5OI02NC0j0kZJE1Tec=) at any time._

**Rep. Bass 'hopeful' on passing police reform legislation**

We have to keep the pressure on to make expansive policing reform a reality. Help fuel Karen's movement to get her police reform bill, the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act, to President Biden's desk. **[Call on Congress to act»](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OdXptrNND8C3oy6sIh258B-RiTjHyoPAqYhTKOBkUg=/kq1NPLdPoTVRhfo7WhdiwKZ1hfssuz1v8fHveGjF1Go=?gpsid=39_132_18343&ms=em21_210504_welc2_adv_gq_jipa_auto_TB_ettx&refcode=em21_210504_welc2_adv_gq_jipa_auto_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210504_welc2_adv_gq_jipa_auto_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

It's time to:
* Ban chokeholds;
* Ban no-knock warrants;
* Prohibit racial, religious, and discriminatory profiling by law enforcement agencies;
* Create a national police misconduct registry so problem officers can't get rehired;
* And create a national standard for policing.

**_It 's been time, friend._ We need police reform NOW. **

Hundreds of thousands of Americans are demanding justice and accountability in our policing system, right now, and Karen needs you to fuel the movement. **[Take action with Karen today to call on Congress to bring the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to a vote»](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OdXptrNND8C3oy6sIh258B-RiTjHyoPAqYhTKOBkUg=/kq1NPLdPoTVRhfo7WhdiwKZ1hfssuz1v8fHveGjF1Go=?gpsid=39_132_18343&ms=em21_210504_welc2_adv_gq_jipa_auto_TB_ettx&refcode=em21_210504_welc2_adv_gq_jipa_auto_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210504_welc2_adv_gq_jipa_auto_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

Onward,

Team Bass

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/2OdXptrNND8C3oy6sIh258B-RiTjHyoPAqYhTKOBkUg=/ktk7QVd-Tm3DLLeJxxU6il27LMs3bgLj4uQoGm_yglk=?gpsid=39_132_15877&refcode=em21_210504_welc2_adv_gq_jipa_auto_TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210504_welc2_adv_gq_jipa_auto_TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)
---

Washington, DC 20003 United States

The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=210312_onboard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=210312_onboard]Hey Derek,
Earlier we wrote to you about Ibraheem and NARAL Pro-Choice VA. We incorrectly called this an endorsement of the campaign and should have clarified that it was an acknowledgement from NARAL Pro-Choice Virginia on his voting record these past 2 years, where Delegate Samirah earned the highest score of an A. You can review all of that here.
We apologize for any confusion and hope everyone can understand. Everything else was accurately reflected on our social media for any clarification.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=210518_naralphoto [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=210518_naralphoto]
Ibraheem has been (and always will be) a Pro-Choice champion and this acknowledgement by NARAL means the world to him and our whole team. NARAL has made a name for itself as a consistent advocate for reproductive rights for ALL, and Ibraheem has worked tirelessly to help advance measures that would improve reproductive justice.
In 2021 Virginia can set the tone for the rest of the country by voting for Progressive, Pro-Choice advocates like Ibraheem Samirah. But we need your help to get the message out there. Can you donate today to help us amplify our message to every corner of the 86th District? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=210518_naral]
$15 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=05018_naral&amount=15] $30 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=0518_naral&amount=30]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=0518_naral&amount=100] Other » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=210518_naral]
Between now and June 8th we're going to do all we can to reach every voter possible with Ibraheem's message of reproductive justice for all, and it's all possible because of grassroots donors like you.
Talk soon,
Team Samirah
Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samirah-for-virginia-1?refcode=210517_gyoung]

---
Peter,

This is a much longer email than I normally send, but I hope you'll give me the courtesy of reading the entire thing.

**A lot of people have asked me how this campaign will be any different than my last run against Nunes in 2020. Please, give me a chance to explain.**

I'll be honest with you, Peter... losing the last election was hard for me.

I worked my heart out, and I was so humbled by all of the volunteers and grassroots donors who stepped up to help us, and put their hope in us.

**But after we lost, the experts who had initially counted me out commended our fight.**

Political analysts said that because of our fight, Devin Nunes will face an entire _future_ of competitive races. They said they’ve never seen the career politician campaign as much as he did against me.

Nunes is scared of our grassroots coalition — _144,000 votes strong_ — that knows California deserves better than him.

This time, I know we can beat Nunes for good. But I have to ask for your help to do it.

**[I’m determined to defeat MAGA traitor Devin Nunes, but I’m going to need all the help I can get. It’s a big ask, but I’m counting on 500 grassroots Democrats to support this campaign tonight. So, Peter, will you help me oust Nunes with your $3? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29368702/286185992/-442210315?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20210517_EMDF_E1_T0_30DO04_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2Q3ZDlhYy1mZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waFPByNljvh4UnuCLqUG4kxnyPtdbqjEZCu7fFMuwTQ=)** | [RUSH $3 IMMEDIATELY AND HELP US OUST DEVIN NUNES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29368703/286185999/-442210315?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20210517_EMDF_E1_T0_30DO04_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2Q3ZDlhYy1mZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=waFPByNljvh4UnuCLqUG4kxnyPtdbqjEZCu7fFMuwTQ=)

body:
NINE state, local and federal agencies approved permits for veterans' Memorial Day gatherings, but President Biden's Department of Defense is the ONE roadblock they face. They were denied a permit to gather at The Pentagon citing COVID-19.
|
---
| | |
_**" The Pentagon is the only one that wouldn't work with us."**_
This is the LAST CALL! Don't you want to stand up for our war heroes after the Biden Administration DENIED their permit to carry on a 30-year Memorial Day tradition?!
**[<< YES! I STAND WITH OUR VETERANS >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FbKWev4gTJpCZFrnaW0yWht8zntxqDP62vATCbntlVguXJeuyrT_-BWfUKT0l0jekxMO_iQbUpTDPyjUqqt07UxBjWw73PJ66jWJVdu6tgtpn9pM3TFa_siTFP-NLQWTrzM2llg1D7xl9BxCJrpbC1fxSaT8WmHq7lWqk_TSmp1fum4x4IH7eGQNRz46IlTu8d_0iGqIQ6xH0TWqtk44UTLOSl8aEuvcMH7FDdQ1dfL9_uwi_wX6kcuvTfOetbQ4C7Nd2m5Km3cLJjXnz8sx3LVP8uNacxppnDiwYcDj-5q4f9dN2MPGltorYZzVSw7Jy-4RG5UWD5PPU6Kdh2KyJiOv3QDAg77bBVD9B9xNdVCxkGnDjhOd_69-8kJ7f8mVS2Gm5v641j2hOSOBK_oRE_H5FVqycrCBQuv4LKur9BOTLfdJdTQ8kd3jjA3ZmwhUgyXaTfk6uQg=&c=gTLholVNNHKLJdsXzAq_1M89g7DmCV_bcaqQN0KDocdTMLVysM8tpg==&ch=Q8qTBELpH593Rv2RN5TMtwO_5CZ7s-nK4iQ-ZtQK4Lq4WwGkRT5FLg== "<< YES! We need grassroots American patriots like you. == Thanks, Team Ellzey P.S. We know we keep asking for help, but that's only because everything is riding on the outcome of this Special Election Runoff. In response to the COVID-19 pandemic, Governor Wolf swiftly and surgically signed a disaster declaration and doing so saved lives. Pennsylvania now ranks as the fifth top state with the most vaccinated residents, and that wouldn't have happened without being able to respond quickly to expert guidance and provide much-needed funding to address this crisis. **Voting NO on the first two ballot questions would allow future Pennsylvania****governors to have the ability to declare emergency swiftly in response to crises like COVID-19, as the law allows right now.** These ballot questions risk holding up crucial time in responding to deadly emergencies in a legislative quagmire. I'll be voting "no" on ballot questions 1 and 2 because I believe Governor Wolf acted prudently and in the best interest of our Commonwealth. [**Above all else, make sure you go out and vote! name: Rick Larsen
subject: One verdict is not justice. It is time to act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
|
---
| | Earlier this year, I wrote to you about my support for the **George Floyd Justice in Policing Act**. That was before the verdict. **The guilty verdict in this case is an important step toward accountability and justice, but a single verdict is not justice. Justice only comes when the systemic racism in our policing culture is wholly eliminated.** How do we change the culture? It starts by changing the rules. That will not magically change things overnight, but it will put in place new expectations for behavior — that will guide hiring, training, promotion, and accountability measures. That is exactly the heart of the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. This legislation is a critical step in the right direction. My colleagues and I will continue fighting in Congress to ensure it is passed and then signed into law. Stay tuned. _Rick_ Forwarded Message [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29370151/286190769/1724000570?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjViOTdkZC0wMmI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3CouzPkR1T1PWF6H9dYitXteC3e_PA6eR6whe4zJOtk=&emci=5afd87d2-72b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=825b97dd-02b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9494239) For so many of us, we were raised on the basic notion that the police exist to protect and serve, to keep our communities safe. While it is undoubtedly critical to have strong, accountable police departments across Northwest Washington and America, for far too many people, the police have become a symbol of inequality, fear, and even violence. **That is why I support the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act.** George Floyd. Breonna Taylor. Eric Garner. Ahmaud Arbery. Rayshard Brooks. Tamir Rice. Each of these lives and countless others were cut short. These tragedies happened because in the eyes of too many Americans, their lives did not matter. And that is the problem: **there cannot be real justice for these victims or their families without addressing the systemic issues that enable inequity and racism to persist across America.** **The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act begins to take on some of the very real, very dire problems in our national policing model.** I am referring to "legal" chokeholds. Those must go. Investigating misconduct and creating a national registry to track it. Requiring dashboard and body cameras. Restricting the use of military equipment by civilian police agencies. And creating national standards for the operation of police departments. Of course, this is only the beginning. The law must make it through the U.S. Senate and be signed by President Biden. And then we must demand that individual states and communities take action. **But we must start somewhere. I understand that police conduct reform is not enough to end the injustice. I will continue to support legislation that tackles systemic racism throughout our society.** Stay tuned. _Rick_ |

clean_body: | | | Earlier this year, I wrote to you about my support for the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. That was before the verdict. The guilty verdict in this case is an important step toward accountability and justice, but a single verdict is not justice. Justice only comes when the systemic racism in our policing culture is wholly eliminated. How do we change the culture? It starts by changing the rules. That will not magically change things overnight, but it will put in place new expectations for behavior — that will guide hiring, training, promotion, and accountability measures. That is exactly the heart of the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. This legislation is a critical step in the right direction. My colleagues and I will continue fighting in Congress to ensure it is passed and then signed into law. Stay tuned. Rick Forwarded Message For so many of us, we were raised on the basic notion that the police exist to protect and serve, to keep our communities safe. While it is undoubtedly critical to have strong, accountable police departments across Northwest Washington and America, for far too many people, the police have become a symbol of inequality, fear, and even violence. That is why I support the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. George Floyd. Breonna Taylor. Eric Garner. Ahmaud Arbery. Rayshard Brooks. Tamir Rice. Each of these lives and countless others were cut short. These tragedies happened because in the eyes of too many Americans, their lives did not matter. And that is the problem: there cannot be real justice for these victims or their families without addressing the systemic issues that enable inequity and racism to persist across America. The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act begins to take on some of the very real, very dire problems in our national policing model. I am referring to "legal" chokeholds. Those must go. Investigating misconduct and creating a national registry to track it. Requiring dashboard and body cameras. Restricting the use of military equipment by civilian police agencies. And creating national standards for the operation of police departments. Of course, this is only the beginning. The law must make it through the U.S. Senate and be signed by President Biden. And then we must demand that individual states and communities take action. But we must start somewhere. I understand that police conduct reform is not enough to end the injustice. I will continue to support legislation that tackles systemic racism throughout our society. Stay tuned. clean_body: They colluded with the CDC to keep schools closed. | | | | | | | | | | Friend, | The Teachers’ Union colluded with the CDC to keep schools closed. We need to fight back. We need our kids back in schools, AND we need to make sure they’re learning facts , NOT anti-American propaganda. "If you agree, Turning Point USA needs your help to launch Turning Point Academy... to take back our schools, defend the future of our nation, and make our kids love America again." "Will you pitch in $25 or more so we can get Turning Point Academy up and running in time for the 2021-2022 school year?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Earlier this year, the CDC suddenly released new “science” to stop schools from reopening... even though many states have had kids in schools since last September, with no outbreaks of COVID-19. Now? We’ve uncovered evidence proving that the CDC changed their recommendations simply because the Teachers’ Union demanded it , not because of “science.” In fact, the CDC literally copy-pasted lines from a Union propaganda document into their “science-based” recommendations. Radical Leftists today—and the crony Teachers’ Unions—want an uneducated, gullible, lazy next generation that they can easily force-feed anti-American propaganda. We CANNOT let that happen. Turning Point Academy will be the FIRST nationwide educational effort to combat far-Left radicalism. We’re working to train educators**anddevelop pro-America curricula , to give our kids the fact-based education they deserve in their classrooms. To maximize our impact, we need to launch Turning Point Academy THIS FALL, in time for the 2021-2022 school year. "We need your IMMEDIATE help to make that happen." "Save our kids from the radical Left and Teachers’ Union thugs by pitching in $9 or more right away. >>" | | | | Thanks, | | | Charlie Kirk

name: Mike Collier for Lt. Gov.
subject: Help sustain our movement by a country mile
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Hello folks,

From day one, grassroots supporters like you have been the foundation of our people-powered movement, and Mike is so grateful to have you on board.

You see, Mike has a plan to fund our schools, invest in our economy, and upgrade our power grid to build a better future for all Texans, but he cannot do it alone.

The next few months will likely determine whether Mike has the resources and backing to take the fight to Dan Patrick. In the months ahead, we’ll be expecting a summer slowdown in fundraising as the legislative session ends.

Like Mike says, in order to hold ‘em accountable, we have to beat ‘em. By making a monthly contribution, you are building up our team for long-term success and paving the way for Mike’s path to victory.

Help sustain our movement by a country mile. Become a recurring donor today, and we’ll send you our FREE special edition, “I Like Mike,” sticker to express our gratitude! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-email-may2021-recurringsticker?refcode=em210518-recurringsticker]

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-email-may2021-recurringsticker?refcode=em210518-recurringsticker]

Mike isn’t afraid of making the tough decisions to preserve the future of our great state — even if he has to yell at cows to do it.

Thanks for being in it for the long haul,

Mike Collier for Lt. Gov.
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States
[https://collierfortexas.com/] |

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Where do you think Indiana ranked?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Since taking office in 2017, Governor Holcomb has led Indiana to four consecutive years of record job commitments and economic investment. [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=038654a408bd450e92e548b4aa189041&_e=c6exxeZgSydPnl2XwNX9el-0jbNQIFpzphTbCSu37_jc5J1kKxUOYMFnJ7gYX7Fx6rbdhiD8kKMJJqEaWlig0BCPBMrENUDSfHkxOeJf2nkb96yYzaePHeJBi4bAizOaKS2YtGuf82x65v64PtU76o52KUdug2Kby88jJv0eBj44NLXv-yx4uzoob_iL86jxx49J9usvf9aOogKP557ssSf4m1nSW0LlkgNgHIc0Iu3mVTtbMVieCOBeeid8WgwweQXdeXn3pZrZwhNPEoUKP0g4aTMYEMV0ufempphSD_OFfuDK12q4WDsDyY4dw4v3NtoPXtvXiXeA6nEcFEnrUpIGJCNp3uOakOly_uxIFoDPF7NNFMTiMyGYZqRjY93lSmPFo3obG4zraraQt8c-txZEuGko0suuL6OGyrExubQ7_JmiEPLiFQ30F14jbkPzvNRvUVroAk-SnT1y6Sry98Nk3WRKbdBIAUJtl78LRQc%3D) | |
---
|
---
Friend,

Indiana is living up to its name as “a state that works” under Governor Holcomb’s leadership.

In the short time since the budget was passed, Apple, Amazon, and Toyota have joined forces to invest hundreds of millions of dollars in the Hoosier economy and committed to creating nearly 3,000 new jobs.

Since taking office in 2017, Governor Holcomb has led Indiana to four consecutive years of record job commitments and economic investment.

_Not even the pandemic was able to stop those records from being broken in 2020!_

**And we’re just getting started.**

Governor Holcomb kept his foot on the gas in this budget by investing half a billion dollars to launch the Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) which will:

* Support recovering small businesses
* Provide critical resources for Hoosier manufacturers
* Help entrepreneurs attract more startup capital

This program is transformational and will set the Hoosier economy up for years of success. With investments being made in every region of Indiana, **the sky is the limit for Hoosier workers** both today and tomorrow, no matter where they are in the state.

Throw a balanced budget, a triple-A credit rating, and low taxes on top of that, and you’ve got one of the nation’s brightest economic beacons.

clean_body: Since taking office in 2017, Governor Holcomb has led Indiana to four consecutive years of record job commitments and economic investment. | | | Friend, Indiana is living up to its name as “a state that works” under Governor Holcomb’s leadership. In the short time since the budget was passed, Apple, Amazon, and Toyota have joined forces to invest hundreds of millions of dollars in the Hoosier economy and committed to creating nearly 3,000 new jobs. Since taking office in 2017, Governor Holcomb has led Indiana to four consecutive years of record job commitments and economic investment. Not even the pandemic was able to stop those records from being broken in 2020! And we’re just getting started. Governor Holcomb kept his foot on the gas in this budget by investing half a billion dollars to launch the Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) which will: Support recovering small businesses Provide critical resources for Hoosier manufacturers Help entrepreneurs attract more startup capital This program is transformational and will set the Hoosier economy up for years of success. With investments being made in every region of Indiana, the sky is the limit for Hoosier workers both today and tomorrow, no matter where they are in the state. Throw a balanced budget, a triple-A credit rating, and low taxes on top of that, and you’ve got one of the nation’s brightest economic beacons. In fact, official ratings just came in for the nation’s best states to do business in.** Thank you for your support, \- Holcomb Crew | | ---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2021. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
Republican leadership has had Hoosiers’ backs throughout the pandemic. Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470486?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-job-growth-manufacturing-051721?utm_agency=alpha&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_content=e_job_growth_manufacturing_051721&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=HouseFile&mc_cid=fdd7d25ac8&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican

Indiana is not only surviving these days — we’re thriving.

And it’s thanks to our Republican leadership, who have continued to put people above politics throughout the COVID-19 pandemic and into our recovery.

In our recent session, we passed a balanced budget, made major strides in education, and made key investments in our infrastructure. That just scratches the surface!

Under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Indiana had four record-breaking years of economic growth and job development. To make sure that we keep that momentum going even after the pandemic shutdowns, we launched the Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI) initiative.

READI dedicates $500 million in strategic investment that will support communities across the state and encourage innovative policies that will spur population growth.

We also recently announced the expansion of the Indiana Small Business Restart Grant, which will support Hoosier entrepreneurs and small businesses to help them come back strong.

Biden, Pelosi, Schumer, and The Squad can’t stand how well we’re doing in Indiana, and they’re doing everything they can to turn our state blue in 2022. They’re already filling their war chest and going after our leadership, and we need to fight back NOW.

Please RUSH a grassroots donation right now to help us keep Indiana RED, and continue to flourish!

Peter — In a minute, **[I’ll ask you to add a donation to my campaign for Lt. Governor as we approach the final, critical weeks of this primary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29373437/286202955/2006474955?refcode=hla-em-210518-lme&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjU2NzQ3My0wZGI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ItN4Zs76G6zCRXMfhRLPRBRY1w1GHKvETVWCAa43IsE=)** But first, I want to share a story with you. It’s long, but important — and I hope you will take the time to read it. I was 24 years old and working at a gas station when I found out I was pregnant. I was young, scared, and had no health insurance. At the hospital, I faced life-threatening complications and I wasn’t sure if my son and I would survive the night — thanks to Medicaid, we did. When Donald Trump was elected President of the United States, I knew I had to do something because the communities and institutions — like Medicaid — that helped my families through those difficult times would be under attack. **So, I did the only thing I could: I quit my job, cashed in my retirement savings, and ran for the Virginia House of Delegates.** It wasn’t easy — my bank account balance was just $68 when we won that race! — but I can say with full confidence that it was worth it. I was elected as part of a Blue Wave that wiped out the Republican supermajority in the State House. And once we took the majority, we got to work delivering on our promises — including expanding Medicaid for 500,000 Virginians. Now, the people of Virginia once again have a choice. We simply can't afford Republican leadership that will strip away affordable care and essential protections for folks with pre-existing conditions. In the House, I stood up against their attacks and passed progressive laws, but this fight isn’t over yet — more than 700,000 Virginians still do not have access to health insurance. As Lt. Governor, I'll ensure we continue our progress by further expanding Medicaid, lowering prescription drug prices, and ensuring that every Virginian has access to care no matter their zip code — but I need your help getting there. **Will you chip in toward my campaign for Lt.
