name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, Giffords.org
subject: Hi I’m Debbie!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hello, there! I wanted to quickly introduce myself.
My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and I’m the new Senior Advisor to Giffords!
I’m so excited for my new role at Giffords. Gun safety has never been so important or more urgent than right now and I am honored to work with Giffords to make more progress on commonsense gun safety reform.
I’ve dedicated my life to advocating for gun safety measures. I’m a former congresswoman and served as the Vice-Chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. And I worked tirelessly in the House to pass universal background checks in 2019.
Unfortunately, when our bill got to the Senate, former Senate Majority Leader, MItch McConnell, left the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2019 untouched on his desk for almost two years.
So now, I’m working with Giffords to make sure that a universal background checks bill finally gets signed into law. We’re closer than ever before, which is why I have to ask:
[**If you are able, can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? I’ll make sure your contribution gets put to work right away in our efforts to urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?&amount=3&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=1&refcode2=121_3935704_7gbtGg&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=14&refcode2=121_3935704_7gbtGg&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=15&refcode2=121_3935704_7gbtGg&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=16&refcode2=121_3935704_7gbtGg&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=17&refcode2=121_3935704_7gbtGg&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=18&refcode2=121_3935704_7gbtGg&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=19&refcode2=121_3935704_7gbtGg&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg)**
---
****
When I was 24 years old, my life was forever changed due to gun violence. My father didn’t have the chance to walk me down the aisle or meet my beautiful children, because his life was taken far too soon. This issue is personal for me, as I know it is for Gabby, too. I have so much admiration for Gabby and the work this organization has done to save lives from gun violence and change the conversation around gun safety in America.
I’m hoping you will join me to help save lives while I take on this new role. I’m thrilled to join Giffords and play a part in enacting change to make our communities safer.
All of my best,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
Senior Advisor, Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may21?refcode=em210518-1-15&t=20&refcode2=121_3935704_7gbtGg&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=121%2E3935704%2E7gbtGg) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

body:
The Democratic National Committee in Washington, D.C., is pouring loads of money into Republican counties across Mississippi. | |
---
Dear Supporter,
The Democratic National Committee in Washington, D.C., is pouring loads of money into Republican counties across Mississippi. All politics is local, and the Democratic Party is doing everything they can to get Democrat politicians elected at the county level to turn our state **BLUE**!
[**_Keep Mississippi RED!_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=99c0463e9274443a9b866d7947be672c&_e=UIkwyDdi2Yk-fnSQPW-p3tCzUVVDEHR7Z3JzZ8_OuoKXgn2TPJZr--79XTUWYr7KKwSLaa4kqsMNyPizyf1vGPPkaykF5XAapm-d2b35D4znau-9ybif_YDyXrq8aeUbY9QGRPBlYGbBrVIvv4h3ppbYLQZKfkrM9SgX7IgfGcY1W3eoIR9fdCrY9ilAAPVG0_HHGIQK9d3aLvMmaN8HgO_QiX7up1Ac9hoV0QxQC5t1lJxW6odZ3469cw9sxOc_LoUUSCoCxJYYAaE6xrcFUubpL3hKePlGsQxiEQlRXaxat6-tyiSqtiX9s7sICnTMjwNdP7s6paxIR-VU34II6Ol43UH4jDPVGlwrJ_597HCqndzsLESihYjGH5Ji2oP8GebtP3kJCQ7LLsulBWiEbg%3D%3D)
In fact, recent reports noted that “ _**national and state Democratic officials have reached a joint fundraising deal to increase aid to their state parties**_ with an extra boost for those in Red states.” The agreement “is intended to allow the party’s wealthiest backers to contribute up to **$875,000 ANNUALLY** to a combined fund that can be distributed to party accounts around the country.”

While political elites in Washington dump money into Mississippi to get liberals elected to impose their socialist agenda, it’s up to us to fight back by supporting Republican candidates in local and county elections across Mississippi.

**We must support Republican candidates in state and local elections across our beloved state, but can’t do it without your help!**
[**Fight Back! Donate Today to Keep MS RED!**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=99c0463e9274443a9b866d7947be672c&_e=UIkwyDdi2Yk-fnSQPW-p3tCzUVVDEHR7Z3JzZ8_OuoKXgn2TPJZr--79XTUWYr7KKwSLaa4kqsMNyPizyf1vGPPkaykF5XAapm-d2b35D4znau-9ybif_YDyXrq8aeUbY9QGRPBlYGbBrVIvv4h3ppbYLQZKfkrM9SgX7IgfGcY1W3eoIR9fdCrY9ilAAPVGmwfLizvMiZ7VjJiyfWXDJnGrqdpDoiarkqfQlrtUQzS_wu0BTKSA3DVq6qgbOkeSmYLCd73iTAuqo2LSbDqAJGSPoYo0p2HujH8jqUi3G6wF4I3jZ14F-ZfKGaMLqZvzBZTzQ0aDUPiI6EMP5gSfVOpwRFf78T2Np_KwHspUPXxyZqqLXybc_XLeijXwvNhGzUAIt9jJygePajw25zWazw%3D%3D)
Right now, we are neck and neck in terms of fundraising with Dems, and they are pulling closer!

**_Now, they are getting reinforcements from political elites in the SWAMP!_**

We know Democrat politicians are coming after our guns, opening our southern border, funding abortion on demand, and tax us to death! _These policies are destroying freedom here in the last stand on Earth and are setting a**HORRIBLE** precedent for this nation._

_**Future generations may not grow up in the land of the free as we once knew it. **_

**Help us prevent Democrat politicians from controlling Mississippi!**
[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=99c0463e9274443a9b866d7947be672c&_e=UIkwyDdi2Yk-fnSQPW-p3tCzUVVDEHR7Z3JzZ8_OuoKXgn2TPJZr--79XTUWYr7KKwSLaa4kqsMNyPizyf1vGPPkaykF5XAapm-d2b35D4znau-9ybif_YDyXrq8aeUbY9QGRPBlYGbBrVIvv4h3ppbYLQZKfkrM9SgX7IgfGcY1W3eoIR9fdCrY9ilAAPVGNbK-vMryXEiab3kwB_7ookylDvnZB0kb42juxjnnZhXwuvM9-KuMEDZFufcSNqIvi4lyp56YMZZdRJDWFpRMeFfi54YhvE20bXNP-m3hllpzXTQVpOBkQ0BpBiPe7KY8_QI9AW08fEAjVJrWPxWc1f5OEx2zNND83_M91jiOSR3FgGkOZmbaELQ8tWpxj0HS6VEIGoPvfp_0trlKnJqXOw%3D%3D)
Thank you,

The Mississippi GOP

These policies are destroying freedom here in the last stand on Earth and are setting aHORRIBLE precedent for this nation. Future generations may not grow up in the land of the free as we once knew it. Help us prevent Democrat politicians from controlling Mississippi! Thank you, The Mississippi GOP | Visit for more information. | | ---|--- Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party P.O. Box 60, Jackson, MS 39205 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Federal Election Law requires we report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for contributions that exceed $200 per calendar year. All donations will be applied to the federal account unless prohibited by federal election law. Mississippi law allows corporate contributions up to $1,000 per calendar year.

| | **Here’s the thing:** Wisconsin is one of the top pickup opportunities for Democrats in 2022. _And we cannot afford to have this stay a GOP-held seat._

Republicans are just a single seat away from retaking the Senate majority — and if that happens, here is where we would stand:
* Mitch McConnell would once again be Majority Leader and have the power to kill any and all legislation
* Any action on voting rights would stall
* **With abortion related cases being heard in the Supreme Court, the GOP could severely limit a women’s right to choose**

name: Roger Misso
subject: Fwd: Let's show Tammy Duckworth that we have her back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,
Just bumping up Secretary Murphy's e-mail in your inbox. Did you see it?
We have less than 3 hours to our big event with Tammy Duckworth, and [_**we 've still got plenty of tickets**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hADZvgCdiZymPEor30HkB8ISnTU0gvrCt29Wv49yrFI=/ZjJLd9qeb50dKWIaOznKuCGHiVBzKUKYC9ZZ3bMpFM4=) left! [_**We are $2,315 from our goal for the rally - can you chip in right now to let Senator Duckworth know that we 've got her back?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hADZvgCdiZymPEor30HkB8ISnTU0gvrCt29Wv49yrFI=/ZjJLd9qeb50dKWIaOznKuCGHiVBzKUKYC9ZZ3bMpFM4=)
See you in a few hours!
In solidarity,
Roger

On May 18, 2021 at 10:27AM, Patrick Murphy <info@takingthehillpac.com> wrote:
>
>
>

Peter,

The veterans of Taking the Hill are proud to launch our 2022 US Senate slate with a big, virtual rally celebrating our [first endorsement of the cycle: **Senator Tammy Duckworth!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hADZvgCdiZymPEor30HkB8ISnTU0gvrCt29Wv49yrFI=/ZjJLd9qeb50dKWIaOznKuCGHiVBzKUKYC9ZZ3bMpFM4=)

And personally, Tammy has been a hero of mine for a long time. She's a fellow soldier and a wounded warrior who has been a tireless advocate for all veterans. As a parent, her advocacy for working mothers on the floor of the US Senate has been incredible. We need more people like Tammy in the Senate - that's why I'm working hard to make sure she gets re-elected!

It would make me so proud if we could "pack the Zoom" tonight to cheer on Senator Duckworth and celebrate her service. [_**This link will take you to a page where you can purchase a ticket. Will you join me today in showing Tammy that we have her back?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hADZvgCdiZymPEor30HkB8ISnTU0gvrCt29Wv49yrFI=/ZjJLd9qeb50dKWIaOznKuCGHiVBzKUKYC9ZZ3bMpFM4=)

([_**We are still looking for 2 more people to sponsor this event at the Champion level or above ($2,500)**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hADZvgCdiZymPEor30HkB8ISnTU0gvrCt29Wv49yrFI=/ZjJLd9qeb50dKWIaOznKuCGHiVBzKUKYC9ZZ3bMpFM4=) \- _we 'll thank you publicly at the event and give you the chance to engage with the Senator afterwards!_)

[**Date: Tuesday, May 18th
Time: 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm Eastern
Location: Zoom!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hADZvgCdiZymPEor30HkB8ISnTU0gvrCt29Wv49yrFI=/ZjJLd9qeb50dKWIaOznKuCGHiVBzKUKYC9ZZ3bMpFM4=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/hADZvgCdiZymPEor30HkB8ISnTU0gvrCt29Wv49yrFI=/ZjJLd9qeb50dKWIaOznKuCGHiVBzKUKYC9ZZ3bMpFM4=)

Let's show up for Senator Duckworth. See you tonight!

In solidarity,

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Fmr Congressman (PA-01)
[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/hADZvgCdiZymPEor30HkB8ISnTU0gvrCt29Wv49yrFI=/u4CVCZUJSrdBByAo8Z57yLB8-yHib5SMniFeBbDYNUk=)

Paid for by Taking the Hill
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

But to me, the biggest red flag is her obsession with _continuing_ the status quo.
**We cannot afford to _continue_ anything President Trump started. We cannot afford to _continue_ the failed leadership of Arizona ****Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward. We cannot _continue_ down the path that led to Arizona having the 49th-best schools and 45th-best health care system. I'm running to _solve_ those problems instead. **
Look friend, I've taken on uphill battles before. I went from plumbing with my dad in Nogales to working in the Obama administration and running a small business. But this is a whole new challenge: **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is already calling this race a toss-up, and the GOP will spend MILLIONS to prop up my extremist new opponent and defeat our people-powered movement. **
**[This $10,000 goal is our first major test in this new stage of the race – and friend, we _cannot_ fail. Mark is a proven champion on gun safety and we must help re-elect him in 2021. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29376983/286217109/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjNjZDBhZC0xOWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aPcSWcAcIbo-XLS-mYwo84pItQXT9xGNdO1J6RPZC5s=&emci=e21d0761-2bb3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=223cd0ad-19b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=9499186) | Friends, **I'm proud that Giffords PAC has endorsed Virginia Attorney General Mark Herring. He is a proven champion on gun safety and we must help reelect him in 2021.** When Mark first ran for Attorney General, most politicians in Virginia didn’t talk about gun violence prevention. But not Mark. He campaigned on safer gun laws in the NRA’s home state. And you know what? Mark won. He was the first Democrat to be elected Virginia Attorney General in 20 years. Since Mark has been elected Attorney General, he has consistently stood up to the gun lobby and won. Mark has been on the right side of the issues that you and I are fighting for and he gets results. That’s why we are proud to again support Mark Herring, a tireless ally in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence. We are going to need people like Mark in office if we want to see our gun laws change. **So today I hope you will join me in supporting Mark Herring’s campaign ahead of his crucial fundraising deadline.** **[Will you make a $25 donation to Mark Herring’s campaign today? We need leaders like Mark fighting for us in the Attorney General’s office if we want to end the epidemic of gun violence in this country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29376984/286217111/-1633305764?refcode=E8588-20210518-Giffords-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-GunViolence-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjNjZDBhZC0xOWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aPcSWcAcIbo-XLS-mYwo84pItQXT9xGNdO1J6RPZC5s=)** Every year that passes we see more and more candidates stepping up to run for office with gun safety as one of their leading issues. I’m excited to work hard with all of you this year to elect gun safety champions like Mark up and down the ballot who will be allies in our fight to end gun violence. My very best,
Gabby Giffords | | [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29376986/286217112/-1633305764?refcode=E8588-20210518-Giffords-SB-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-GunViolence-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjNjZDBhZC0xOWI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aPcSWcAcIbo-XLS-mYwo84pItQXT9xGNdO1J6RPZC5s=)

name: Erica Smith
subject: I will not stand by while the story of my great-great-grandfather, born a slave, is erased
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This isn't a racist dog whistle, it's an air horn.
#
One of our opponents — Republican Rep. Ted Budd — is joining the North Carolina GOP and extremists like Rep. Madison Cawthorne in attacking a brand new target:
_Critical race theory._
[__](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1239?refcode=em20210518-100&t=1&akid=100%2E3698%2EUl4kMF)
According to Rep. Budd, we must “stand against critical race theory.” And instead, “we need to teach [students] that this nation is special.”
**WOAHHH!!! This isn't a racist dog whistle, it's an air horn — and it’s coming from an elected representative and candidate for U.S. Senate. Someone like that should NOT be representing us in Congress.**
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, can you please donate just $3 or more to our campaign today? If elected I would be the first Black senator in North Carolina history, and I’m running to represent ALL of us._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1239?refcode=em20210518-100&t=2&akid=100%2E3698%2EUl4kMF)
**[Donate $3](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1239?refcode=em20210518-100&t=21&akid=100%2E3698%2EUl4kMF)**
These attacks on critical race theory are nothing more than an attempt to deny the existence of racism in our society. It’s critical that we acknowledge that the racism and barriers we face today are systemic holdovers from chattel slavery and Jim Crow segregation.
There's a direct correlation between a failure to teach about the systemic racism of the past and a failure to adequately address it in the present. **We have to confront the history we have with racism in North Carolina.** We have to understand critical race theory not just in North Carolina, but in our nation.
Rep. Budd, however, thinks teaching our children the full history of this nation is a line that we can't cross. He wants to erase our history of oppression. Apparently, for Ted Budd, patriotism is about covering up the injustices of the past and lying about the story of our country.
For our moral movement, however, patriotism is about creating an America in which those injustices no longer exist. We must write a new story that will not require revision — but be inherently just because we made it so.
**I will not stand by while the story of my great-great-grandfather, born a slave, is erased! That is one of the many reasons why I am running for U.S. Senate.**
[**_So please, consider making a donation of $3 or more to our campaign today. Every bit of support that comes our way will help send me to the U.S. Senate, where I’ll fight for working families (and against revisionist history)._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1239?refcode=em20210518-100&t=22&akid=100%2E3698%2EUl4kMF)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210518-100-footer&t=23&refcode2=100_3698_Ul4kMF&akid=100%2E3698%2EUl4kMF)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=100%2E3698%2EUl4kMF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=100%2E3698%2EUl4kMF)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

body:
FOX NEWS: TRUMP TO RUN FOR PRESIDENT IF REPUBLICANS WIN THE HOUSE

I’m stunned.

Trump just declared to Fox News that he WILL run for President if we lose our House Majority.

This is the most important ask I have ever made of you. Trump’s donors rushed him $250 MILLION to help him reclaim power. I need a historic response -- 30,000 gifts before midnight -- to protect my Democrats and make Trump’s plan BACKFIRE. This is so critical, I will personally 5X-match every single gift for the FIRST and LAST time to ensure we keep the Majority firmly in Democrats’ hands >> secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210518_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=15

I need you to make the most important choice of your life.

-- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans, steal our Majority, and barge back into power.

-- Or we can rise up, send a historic response, and show Trump he will NEVER take the House from Democrats.

Trump just hinged his entire Presidential run on reclaiming the House.

I will fight with everything I have to defend it from his grasp. But I can’t do it alone -- not when he’s armed Republicans with $250 MILLION to defeat us. Can I count on your $15 before my midnight deadline? This is so important to me, I will personally 5X-match your generous gift.

name: House Conservatives
subject: Biden = Carter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Visit [here](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9696204/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk2OTYyMDQ%3d&x=96ac6878) to unsubscribe.

****
****
_**" Joe Biden is the new Jimmy Carter."**_

Between the inflation of the economy, rising gas prices, and increased taxes, it certainly is true, Fellow Conservative.

The recent gas crisis caused Americans to wait in line for gas for _hours_ just to find out the stations had run out. And this crisis was **yet another one that the Biden administration refused to confront and take accountability for. **

As gas prices continue to soar across the country, so do taxes and inflation. As Biden and his team continue to ignore what's going on in America, they are days away from recreating the disastrous economy under Jimmy Carter: during his administration, inflation, taxes, and gas prices nearly _DOUBLED_.

_Sounds like Democrats never learn their lesson._ [**That 's why we need your help.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9696204/224717773/200577/2/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=47b3d309)

[**Will you stand with House Conservatives and the Republican Party to condemn Biden 's AMERICA LAST policies? name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Major Announcement >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We wanted you to be the first to know!
#

Friends — we have a big endorsement to announce.
**Mark Kelly was just endorsed again by End Citizens United!**
End Citizens United (ECU) is a grassroots organization dedicated to countering the disastrous effects of the Supreme Court decision _Citizens United_ by reforming our campaign finance system.
We were so grateful when they endorsed Mark so early last election cycle, and we are even more excited that they’re sticking with us again — especially after a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC dropped a six-figure ad buy this month in Arizona attacking Mark.
Corporate money has corrupted our politics and it’s time we step up and do something about it. Having the support of ECU’s grassroots community so early into our re-election campaign means so much to Mark and all of us.
We are proudly rejecting corporate PAC money. And that means our campaign is going to be funded by lots of people giving what they can. Because that’s the only way we’re going to defeat the special interests who want to stop us.
[**So if you are able, will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign today? Every dollar you donate allows us to run a grassroots campaign free of corporate PAC influence that is focused on issues that are important to you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210518-1-15&t=1&refcode2=634_6688874_gHGgDd&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=2&refcode2=634_6688874_gHGgDd&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=3&refcode2=634_6688874_gHGgDd&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=4&refcode2=634_6688874_gHGgDd&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=5&refcode2=634_6688874_gHGgDd&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=6&refcode2=634_6688874_gHGgDd&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210518-1-15&t=7&refcode2=634_6688874_gHGgDd&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd)
---|---
We are excited to have the support of an organization who feels just as strongly as we do about reducing the flow of corporate money into our political system.
We can’t thank End Citizen United enough for supporting us this early on. Their support matched with yours will give us the boost we need to hold this seat.
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210518-1-15&t=8&refcode2=634_6688874_gHGgDd&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=634%2E6688874%2EgHGgDd).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. **CONFIDENTIAL MEMO:**

**To** : GOP Patriots
**From** : Rep. Elise Stefanik, House Republican Conference Chair
**Date** : May 14, 2021

**RE: Our House GOP Priorities**

Fellow Conservative,

It is a tremendous honor to serve the American people in my new role as the House Republican Conference Chair.

Right now, our country is experiencing **an economic crisis** , **a border crisis** , **an energy crisis** , and **a national security crisis** \- all the while Nancy Pelosi and her Radical Leftist House Democrats continue to push their socialist agenda.

**Only our House Republicans stand between National Democrats and their goal of big government socialism.**

Our ONLY hope to defeat the Radical Left is to regain our majority in the House. [**Can I count on you to join me in the fight to take back the House for Republicans?**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7QRSg7MImJmZSSyCrB5VsX9Tlc9XBDWI7PEZEKRE4wucxfUwi0RIeaSg4eYh-EX2_KH8NncyTH51uLD8L3CflDMJjk3vi-UTnZd61nMUCtJnv_t0pBPHV9fmdzrjmKylio9CE_P-SABmIwnMktpKzvDLnWSKDlsJTSnJeZKiwFrmNQWeN6X6-84NIkFMXGmUwrB0knvIFy2DaQqKvgCwg48fuKpkQCXy1WKz_E_8Lyq9CkkiqSzJczng2nv97R4epGNOv28KgPGVZ0e6Kl6Jh5h1ZU7ztWKZ3s3OAwj-o6-Jh1wsQtQv00PWKgYZfREUSNWZra4xo_doesS11WmUvSTJhcOMljsYkLNxghz6HBi9qNRlZMpgloELF08g7-LYoqt9w-twFmZfUjP1QldtvVxLNv7xaRESzbz9f29j0N81MO-bnuVf-XmwaJbr5VC&c=hnJFiXk4CtO4qCUUywQ-qqfbaY9OtsfmIVZr0kNyKJ9pmacZ0mES9w==&ch=n98yZ8OKUiKcJt9WkJsBkPK9fAWBxGPZmVPg0hYbnyXRJTeT_y1Piw==)
[**HELP ELISE TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g7QRSg7MImJmZSSyCrB5VsX9Tlc9XBDWI7PEZEKRE4wucxfUwi0RIeaSg4eYh-EX2_KH8NncyTH51uLD8L3CflDMJjk3vi-UTnZd61nMUCtJnv_t0pBPHV9fmdzrjmKylio9CE_P-SABmIwnMktpKzvDLnWSKDlsJTSnJeZKiwFrmNQWeN6X6-84NIkFMXGmUwrB0knvIFy2DaQqKvgCwg48fuKpkQCXy1WKz_E_8Lyq9CkkiqSzJczng2nv97R4epGNOv28KgPGVZ0e6Kl6Jh5h1ZU7ztWKZ3s3OAwj-o6-Jh1wsQtQv00PWKgYZfREUSNWZra4xo_doesS11WmUvSTJhcOMljsYkLNxghz6HBi9qNRlZMpgloELF08g7-LYoqt9w-twFmZfUjP1QldtvVxLNv7xaRESzbz9f29j0N81MO-bnuVf-XmwaJbr5VC&c=hnJFiXk4CtO4qCUUywQ-qqfbaY9OtsfmIVZr0kNyKJ9pmacZ0mES9w==&ch=n98yZ8OKUiKcJt9WkJsBkPK9fAWBxGPZmVPg0hYbnyXRJTeT_y1Piw==)

As the newly elected House Republican Conference Chair, I want to share my priorities for our party so we can work together toward a common goal. This will not be an easy job, but I know we are stronger when united as a team.

Together, let's work to pass legislation that will accomplish the following for our great nation:
* Grow our economy
* Reopen our schools
* Promote American energy independence
* Secure our border
* Strengthen our national security
* Protect our Constitution

You know this all boils down to one thing: **PUTTING AMERICA FIRST**.

We cannot let the successes achieved under President Trump's leadership be tossed away by National Democrats. We MUST take back the House!

Today I was elected House Republican Conference Chair. I wanted to take a moment to share with you my priorities and mission to fire Nancy Pelosi and put a stop to her radical socialist agenda. ***I am only sharing the below memo with a select group of True American Patriots -keep it away from any Democrats! There is way too much at risk for people to be sitting idly on the sidelines. We are only 5 seats away from restoring our majority in Congress - if we can't make that happen, Trump's legacy will be TARNISHED. Your support is critical to our success right now. While the Democrats are raking in the cash from dark money donors, we're relying on grassroots patriots like yourself to win each and every battle ahead. So please read my memo below, and if you're committed to joining our fight to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back the House, == == Thank you for your dedication to our Conservative movement! We cannot take back the House without you. Regards, Congresswoman Elise Stefanik House Republican Conference Chair == == == CONFIDENTIAL MEMO: To : GOP Patriots From : Rep. Elise Stefanik, House Republican Conference Chair Date : May 14, 2021 RE: Our House GOP Priorities Fellow Conservative, It is a tremendous honor to serve the American people in my new role as the House Republican Conference Chair. Right now, our country is experiencing an economic crisis , a border crisis , an energy crisis , and a national security crisis \- all the while Nancy Pelosi and her Radical Leftist House Democrats continue to push their socialist agenda. Only our House Republicans stand between National Democrats and their goal of big government socialism. Our ONLY hope to defeat the Radical Left is to regain our majority in the House. == == As the newly elected House Republican Conference Chair, I want to share my priorities for our party so we can work together toward a common goal. This will not be an easy job, but I know we are stronger when united as a team. Together, let's work to pass legislation that will accomplish the following for our great nation: Grow our economy Reopen our schools Promote American energy independence Secure our border Strengthen our national security Protect our Constitution You know this all boils down to one thing: PUTTING AMERICA FIRST. We cannot let the successes achieved under President Trump's leadership be tossed away by National Democrats. We MUST take back the House! == I am excited to lead our House GOP Conference as Chair to protect America from the looming threat of socialism. North Carolina came through in a **BIG** way for President Trump in 2020, and that’s why he’s kicking things off with a **MAJOR EVENT** right here in our state.
* We formally nominated him for re-election.
* We ensured that a Pro-Trump Senator was re-elected, despite _massive_ Left-wing spending.
* We delivered North Carolina’s Electoral College votes for President Trump in a clear and fair victory.

Now, we need to look forward. That’s why we’re collecting a list of **EVERY TRUMP SUPPORTER** who donates to help **SAVE AMERICA** and giving it directly to the President after his big speech.

name: Gwen Rocco, Terry for Virginia
subject: BREAKING: Reproductive rights are on the line [SIGN ON]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Let Terry know what you think.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29380085/286227609/-2023814932?refcode=20210518_GR_5AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWY3ZjJjOC0yNGI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZBabzY8RgIl-hmarFUsfveLPGX7IzWxBJQ1QsVPXFk=)

| | Derek,

**Some major news just broke -- and it could have a major impact on this election.**

The Supreme Court has taken up its first challenge to abortion rights since Amy Coney Barrett was appointed to the court by Donald Trump, and reproductive rights are hanging in the balance.

Depending on how the Court rules, there’s a strong chance **we could see the end of Roe v. Wade, and the protection of abortion rights will fall to the states.**

**[We need to know -- what do you think? Do you agree with Terry that we need to protect access to reproductive health care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29380086/286227610/-637892752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWY3ZjJjOC0yNGI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZBabzY8RgIl-hmarFUsfveLPGX7IzWxBJQ1QsVPXFk=&emci=dbf9f826-13b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=79f7f2c8-24b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7540477)**

As Governor, Terry was a staunch defender of the right to reproductive health care, standing as a brick wall as Republicans repeatedly tried to pass bills that would restrict abortion rights in Virginia.

Terry’s ready to stand firm yet again, but he’s up against a GOP extremist culture warrior who made banning abortions in Virginia a priority.

Glenn Youngkin, Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate, came out swinging against reproductive rights. In his first rally after accepting the Republican nomination, he even pledged to ban abortion if he becomes Governor.

**[We can’t let that happen, Derek. Please, take our survey and let Terry know that you’re standing with him in defense of reproductive rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29380087/286227611/-637892752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWY3ZjJjOC0yNGI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZBabzY8RgIl-hmarFUsfveLPGX7IzWxBJQ1QsVPXFk=&emci=dbf9f826-13b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=79f7f2c8-24b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=7540477)**

Derek, the Governor will be the last line of defense against attacks on abortion rights.

Let’s make sure that Governor is Terry.

Gwen Rocco
Deputy Campaign Manager
Terry for VA | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29380088/286227612/-2023814932?refcode=20210518_GR_5AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWY3ZjJjOC0yNGI4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZBabzY8RgIl-hmarFUsfveLPGX7IzWxBJQ1QsVPXFk=)

name: Healthcare Petition -- via Team Navarre for Congress
subject: Add your name to support healthcare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
The COVID-19 Pandemic shined a light onto just how broken our healthcare system really is. Fortunately, over the past few months, President Biden has opened up a special enrollment period for the Affordable Care Act which has resulted in over one million sign-ups. That means over one million more Americans now have healthcare coverage.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/xOdKTWK8Ckq3Fv5PRBsb0A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xOdKTWK8Ckq3Fv5PRBsb0A2]
This is a great start, but Stewart believes that in America all of us must have access to quality, affordable healthcare and he will advocate for an improved healthcare system that covers all Americans.
If you’re with Stewart, add your name below to let us know that you want him to go to Congress and work to make sure Virginians have healthcare coverage. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xOdKTWK8Ckq3Fv5PRBsb0A2]

**NOW:** With 3 weeks left until the Democratic primary, the GOP has selected their candidate for Governor: Glenn Youngkin.

**[Donate now to the ONLY Democratic candidate with upward momentum and the ability to motivate Democratic voters: Jennifer Carroll Foy.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-PPaLGDYXP9CqlPFE4hLEOXVgZR-ABGMe4rL5IMEEDzZlEdwx3os2DDMwXla7NuDkZpi5EqtQka6XHifWo3JKwa5p2-2vmvZMdsd9ClCaoCWeHhMCgnehKJAu4-NiRcbq0OPtFTDa6CKxxX8LIv7fOXCojsg3FH89udxJJSIiy-7I7YG2SDTKxHs6m-XC3LS_rlMk-X8AExuzJdLeEFAOiWVO17LwxExdEgHVYdaJnYt8uW4eS2q2CvVWye-CUppCLGEt4deGHyK3UFh87oYhGJz5Fb1Om6q_5Ls0By9PPLtVk8hHyCferA1ctJmwXxU6/3c0/zqJbHKrgSRmkuV0iUfPWHw/h0/5DyEeKaTnEnZ1qpmoIlweqkMTCrjlNtpzCBA9Erm4gE)**

With your help, Peter, we can show the country that Pennsylvania is a red state, tried and true. Thanks, Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Will you join me in supporting Senator Patty Murray's campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

When I was first considering a run for Congress, someone asked me whether there was a political leader who I especially admired, and my answer was Senator Patty Murray, of course!

I had heard the story of a male legislator once telling Patty that she couldn't make a difference because she was "just a mom in tennis shoes," but she proved him wrong. Not only did she become the first woman (and mom) to represent Washington State in the U.S. Senate, but she has delivered real results for Washington families.

As a fellow mom and member of Congress from Washington, I continue to be inspired by the work Patty has done in the Senate. I'm proud to work alongside her to provide COVID-19 relief, expand access to affordable health care, strengthen our economy, and so much more. Now, Patty is up for re-election in 2022 and she needs our support to keep fighting for Washingtonians in Congress.

**[Will you join me in supporting Senator Patty Murray's re-election campaign? name: Laura Loomer
subject: Davy Crockett, Sam Adams, and Ronald Reagan just got cancelled.
body:
Joe Biden just reversed President Trump's Executive Order to create a "National Garden of American Heroes."
| | | | | Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5nqnfdagpwsBnsdGfGpGlw/vMavy47639Gyg3NvSMbcofCA) This is never-ending.

Joe Biden just reversed President Trump's Executive Order to create a "National Garden of American Heroes."

Trump did this as BLM activists and Antifa were defacing and tearing down statues across the nation - as Trump's point that **American History can 't be cancelled**.

But under Joe Biden, it looks like it can be.

On the list of proposed historical figures to honor in the garden were 244 Americans who made positive impacts on our nation. From Davy Crocket to Harriet Tubman and Susan B. Anthony, everyone was cancelled by the stroke of a pen.

But it gets worse.

Biden also reversed Trump's Order 13925 to prevent online censorship.

By doing that, Biden and Kamala tipped their hats to Facebook, Twitter and Google to keep on cancelling.

And that's where we come in.

I'm finalizing my new lawsuit against Big Tech and will be dropping it soon. [**Please help cover my filing costs and attorney 's fees**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5nqnfdagpwsBnsdGfGpGlw/vMavy47639Gyg3NvSMbcofCA).

My last case stopped at the Supreme Court with Justice Clarence Thomas acknowledging that the time has come to look at the role that social media plays in society in the modern digital era that we are now living in, and the power that they have.

This lawsuit does just that and will open a pandora's box that the Big Tech Mafia will have a hard time containing.

This suit will be historic, and I want you to be one of its original backers.

[**Donate now to back my lawsuit against the Big Tech Mafia.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5nqnfdagpwsBnsdGfGpGlw/vMavy47639Gyg3NvSMbcofCA)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

Over half of American families live in a child care desert, meaning they have no access to affordable child care. This bill will make it easier for child care providers to access small business loans, expanding the availability of much-needed child care. Folks, can Susie count on you to be a citizen co-sponsor of the Small Business Child Care Investment Act? [_**Add your name to show your support for accessible and affordable child care.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29384203/286244877/-696196682?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDk5OWEzZS0zN2I4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCeCDPc6APv0QNjRK-6TAQ0Ybsj-ePqp88Aq1JYaAWU=&emci=896e02e2-56b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=00999a3e-37b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957) | | | [Add My Name >>](https://secure.ngpvan.com/e6ePASITsUi-LDHKeAh-sQ2)

Every single family in Nevada deserves high quality, affordable child care. Right now, Nevada is one of 33 states where infant care is more expensive than college. _**It should not be this expensive to care for our kids.**_
The pandemic amplified the need for a robust child care system and devoted child care providers. This bill aims to do just that.
This initiative is critical to keeping America’s working families strong. [Folks, add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of this critical bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29384204/286244879/471844981?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDk5OWEzZS0zN2I4LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YCeCDPc6APv0QNjRK-6TAQ0Ybsj-ePqp88Aq1JYaAWU=&emci=896e02e2-56b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=00999a3e-37b8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957)

Democrats are coming after our local elections!

Their fundraising efforts are picking up steam and they are specifically targeting Republican cities across our state to support liberal candidates and win as many local races as their money will buy.

**Democrats truly believe they will flip Mississippi BLUE.**
[_**Help us Keep Mississippi RED! >>>**_](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=6b8834e8644a463fac720460ecea4479&_e=nLpcj1VzGfUB9mruzaiVwGjbgjLS7dplAC_L6YV4f0B8WdF9jLEZtyIiKL8CPopQUwT0IH4KJFpmsnV3Zox8xfLq4pkz55L6rIoxNqiLT3I8Rp_U0mSDn-_vP-yOLPrHqhgLcDPX0goIR1Hk1MgYB_PPHmm_vKOm9I3v_HITCwP0rnn8-gLVDaA-T6UWcOPOMNf1kfX1OVcsbPCSfE7EHnITmSQ4gjNpLUZjzYkludxUamZPmrGpVUuz7kwR5oyxhocPmzrP8xWJRvG7tvn7HBp7ax6nU6MpXmhdKITgc8MEOCiXAkZiCHLxsfC3XSKhrun8UcDYY1v1mZIUW92xLHmS7tKtNWzdAcjbNDyBmVXuSsKnclV1EKTxF_sn85XGM6moJUFhhFJw8slwclUhBQ%3D%3D)
They are using the DNC and Washington’s wealthiest donors — coastal elites from Hollywood to New York — to impose liberal policies on us. They want to increase taxes, mandates, and regulations, open our borders, take our guns, and even blur the lines between boy and girl sports. Democrat career politicians from the federal government want to strip us of our liberty and freedom — the very principles upon which this nation was founded.

**We cannot allow this to happen!_We must fight back to defend American freedom for future generations._**

**Today, I am asking you to join me in supporting our state and local Republicans as they campaign against liberals, socialists, and Democrat politicians and their donors from Washington, D.C.**
[**Join me! - Support Mississippi Republicans**](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=6b8834e8644a463fac720460ecea4479&_e=nLpcj1VzGfUB9mruzaiVwGjbgjLS7dplAC_L6YV4f0B8WdF9jLEZtyIiKL8CPopQUwT0IH4KJFpmsnV3Zox8xfLq4pkz55L6rIoxNqiLT3I8Rp_U0mSDn-_vP-yOLPrHqhgLcDPX0goIR1Hk1MgYB_PPHmm_vKOm9I3v_HITCwP0rnn8-gLVDaA-T6UWcOPOyBLt3AVNGnuM5E8U_x7tfXD5P86m4UUI85FBG7ckT0lmpTw2AIZw3la0o8JcAnWBTlViX_3HqFZuuuHtFIudvHkch_oL3-vZk0jyg_en8u18JDMHAjDjPkAgLb7mJVj2GXeXR_PA8vuOZSRlzcL38baeh2umqXl16lsnfFtG_HjfzuLqmcqg7WKY77T6fRdSlwoJkJSDfhAGa2ruJpE8Hw%3D%3D)
**If we don’t come together as one strong party, we may begin to lose elections to Democrats here in Mississippi!**

We have seen other states, like Georgia, fall to the Liberal mob. Now, they are coming for Mississippi and targeting local races across our beloved state.

We want to support Republicans across our state, but we can’t do it without help from American Patriots like you. If you can give, please consider a donation below.

body:
And he wants to know if you're as excited as he is!

****
****
**Trump expected to resume rallies in June -_The Hill_**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Updating you about the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, the Supreme Court just agreed to consider Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health, a case challenging Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban. This is urgent: the case will be a direct challenge to Roe v. Wade.
**This decision could have massive implications for Americans because one in four women have had an abortion — and I am one of them.**
I know firsthand what a profoundly personal choice getting an abortion is and the importance of an individual's right to decide whether or not to have one for themselves — _regardless of income or what state they live in._
I unapologetically stand with the vast majority of Americans on both sides of the aisle who firmly believe that the right to safe, legal abortion care must be protected. That's why I'm asking: [**Can you split an urgent contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford between our campaign and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund today to help us defend the right to choose?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210518?refcode=em20210518-302&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=302_420207_YDVWrh&akid=302%2E420207%2EYDVWrh)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210518?refcode=em20210518-302&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=302_420207_YDVWrh&akid=302%2E420207%2EYDVWrh)**
I am fortunate to live in a state where pregnant people's right to make choices about their own bodies is protected, where so many less fortunate than me can still afford to have abortions without encountering barriers like forced counseling and waiting periods. The network around me helped me exercise my own choice rather than imposing someone else's views on me.
**For me, terminating a pregnancy was not an easy choice, but it was _my_ choice. And that is what must be preserved for every person.**
Congress must recommit to removing barriers to care and defending a person's constitutionally protected right to make their own choices about their own bodies. That can start with the Women's Health Protection Act that I helped to introduce to create a safeguard against abortion bans and medically unnecessary restrictions. Then the work must continue by protecting our Senate majority so that Mitch McConnell doesn't control which justices get on the Supreme Court.
[**I truly believe our collective organizing and activism can hold the line for reproductive rights in this country. If you can afford it at this time, will you chip in a split contribution of $3 or more between our campaign and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210518?refcode=em20210518-302&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=302_420207_YDVWrh&akid=302%2E420207%2EYDVWrh)
The battle to protect reproductive rights may feel exhausting, but we must never stop. I assure you that I never will.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210518-302-footer&t=22&refcode2=302_420207_YDVWrh&akid=302%2E420207%2EYDVWrh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=302%2E420207%2EYDVWrh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=302%2E420207%2EYDVWrh)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

BRING BACK PRESIDENT TRUMP’S ECONOMIC POLICIES

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=111daa29b0a64d5aac69c46908a38325&_e=nmTFFI4iN-VNNbybGWm-EjAMyub-vLj2sL4vtPs3tupiCkG7rTIfVqCrzIrbUtOiJZ_hlhUltoSBV-yHKQEYO51E2sAnAAenG5UKtSQ6uaIMTrjd2pGCs5QjZ2HW1ZQTpqC_wYKsQAy55Z5wOeQhzAl7sLNl--2kSqYmllBHREM8gD2UpkApnQOmpExvxvdnWbOyf5clEmfWoH4BeXAJG5EtC0oINrUs4g2DV-lGQcIF_KnW-Kuapjwby09MMZGX9N36RglcYgGkZpkBiyeJgMmN2g1KIBogG6ddja-BKdyrmxIUIfVN-z5vIkeDL2_WIF22z5rNmNTrGpvhCkMF2iah7O1MRHBAWYEHFfMepxts6GT7YfY0PA1kCnYZWSekclXtKgfP3Lr_iEVkSXLYdq4E07XMVU_S7fCctJjeItgy7IOIY_ugpvH38SnXvylRP9WYrelYWaBi6r7f0aHojvQyHZ6gf6dDaIW2xMzQ7jb_E-MZScjxL-_LAGnfgBQ_xrWBbj_1q72Cs9_JxNvIKVOWzI8C-0sekKXiAOIWp0A%3D)
---
Friends,

Joe Biden and his leftist economic policies are failing the American people. In the last few weeks alone, Americans have seen gas shortages, and the price of food and other goods on the rise...not to mention a massive inflation problem caused by RECORD borrowing and spending from the Biden Administration!

And the cherry on top of the disaster that is the Biden Economy: **PEOPLE ARE GETTING PAID MORE TO STAY HOME THAN TO GET BACK TO WORK.**

It’s an absolute shame when American small businesses can’t even find workers willing to go back to work because of irresponsible actions taken by Washington. This is unacceptable, so I’m working day and night to bring back the successful economic policies of President Trump.
| [**BRING BACK PRESIDENT TRUMP’S ECONOMIC POLICIES**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=111daa29b0a64d5aac69c46908a38325&_e=nmTFFI4iN-VNNbybGWm-EjAMyub-vLj2sL4vtPs3tupiCkG7rTIfVqCrzIrbUtOiJZ_hlhUltoSBV-yHKQEYO51E2sAnAAenG5UKtSQ6uaIMTrjd2pGCs5QjZ2HW1ZQTpqC_wYKsQAy55Z5wOeQhzAl7sLNl--2kSqYmllBHREM8gD2UpkApnQOmpExvxvdnWbOyf5clEmfWoH4BeXAJG5EtC0oINrUs4g2DV-lGQcIF_KnW-Kuapjwby09MMZGX9N36RglcYgGkZpkBiyeJgMmN2g1KIBogG6ddja-BKdyrmxIUIfVN-z5vIkeDL2_WIF22z5rNmNTrGpvhCkMF2m13ru4CHN25ZJrFlpTo7-hwpyNwjGcWeLS779qQL6XAcvDcaoPkwr-MnCZJlIkeXPJFl1tuq9QTPKAohCPUJhKIFEFixx6dO5GJ4qDT_Fjyr6EWBxHtjEgBskwe4VqcS9z1ob81a7tR99iuGiYilKv9Vxd8zxE-JOh-MBr1uyJlRt5JaJt1sRWj8J7wJJAIgzPdXS_5pSRpe5kqwI2oorg%3D)
---

With the swipe of a pen, President Biden spends trillions and doesn’t bat an eye. Pandering to his Far-Left base, he’ll spend more and more, taking our economy down with his approval ratings.

And you can be sure he'll take MORE of your money to foot the bill with historic tax increases. Enough is never enough for these liberals.

We’ve got an economy and a country to save. **[Will you help me do it?](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=111daa29b0a64d5aac69c46908a38325&_e=nmTFFI4iN-VNNbybGWm-EjAMyub-vLj2sL4vtPs3tupiCkG7rTIfVqCrzIrbUtOiJZ_hlhUltoSBV-yHKQEYO51E2sAnAAenG5UKtSQ6uaIMTrjd2pGCs5QjZ2HW1ZQTpqC_wYKsQAy55Z5wOeQhzAl7sLNl--2kSqYmllBHREM8gD2UpkApnQOmpExvxvdnWbOyf5clEmfWoH4BeXAJG5EtC0oINrUs4g2DV-lGQcIF_KnW-Kuapjwby09MMZGX9N36RglcYgGkZpkBiyeJgMmN2g1KIBogG6ddja-BKdyrmxIUIfVN-z5vIkeDL2_WIF22z5rNmNTrGpvhCkMF2pPeQWALuvI8__ZQeJrvNYtEdOp55xJNmZUCOsKnpvZhV1BAOZzz4UiTs8MF9d5TR-XFmZpk_CodZJEnUfUmDZe28FRKFRFXESUdFqlL0cqwBzE3yd0JNfDuXNZ4UEyu6fLESDMgoQ7_q-KqOHdD6B7sV21ZOv73K-RSL1AvJznjA2wA3iF9HFY4HG-zoN9MIAV2jinHR2rS4BVew8rUhg8%3D)**

clean_body: BRING BACK PRESIDENT TRUMP’S ECONOMIC POLICIES | Friends, Joe Biden and his leftist economic policies are failing the American people. In the last few weeks alone, Americans have seen gas shortages, and the price of food and other goods on the rise...not to mention a massive inflation problem caused by RECORD borrowing and spending from the Biden Administration! And the cherry on top of the disaster that is the Biden Economy: PEOPLE ARE GETTING PAID MORE TO STAY HOME THAN TO GET BACK TO WORK. It’s an absolute shame when American small businesses can’t even find workers willing to go back to work because of irresponsible actions taken by Washington. This is unacceptable, so I’m working day and night to bring back the successful economic policies of President Trump. | With the swipe of a pen, President Biden spends trillions and doesn’t bat an eye. Pandering to his Far-Left base, he’ll spend more and more, taking our economy down with his approval ratings. And you can be sure he'll take MORE of your money to foot the bill with historic tax increases. Enough is never enough for these liberals. We’ve got an economy and a country to save. God Bless America, Congresswoman Malliotakis Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. Box 60487 Staten Island, NY 10306 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

clean_body: this is important | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | A lot has happened over the past few months so I wanted to reach out to a few well-informed people in Pennsylvania for a new Digital Interview. President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the entire administration have made such tremendous progress on important issues like the COVID-19 pandemic. I was looking through my records, and you stuck out as someone I can count on to give me an honest assessment of how things are going for you in Pennsylvania. I need your help to create an air-tight strategy to protect my swing district, secure our Democratic Majority, and help President Biden and Vice President Harris pass their agenda. Thanks for your help! \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . Our mid-month deadline is almost here and **we HAVE to raise $10,000 by THURSDAY at midnight or we’ll lose momentum.**
**Nevada is a battleground state and the GOP already has its sights set on flipping it red in 2022.** We _can’t_ let that happen!

clean_body: | | | | | We're just following up on our last email because we still haven’t hit our mid-month fundraising goal ... Here’s why this goal matters: Nevada is going to be a KEY TARGET for National Republicans next year. They’re going to come after our Senator, our Governor, and Reps. Steven Horsford and Susie Lee! And we need to be ready to fight back. We’re up against a GOP warchest. So hitting these regular fundraising benchmarks is absolutely critical. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for being a fighter, Elect Nevada Democrats \---Begin Forwarded Message--- From: Elect NV Democrats Date: Wednesday, May 12 Subject: We need to get ahead We’re not going to sugar coat it: We’re falling behind on our May fundraising goal. Our mid-month deadline is almost here and we HAVE to raise $10,000 by THURSDAY at midnight or we’ll lose momentum. Nevada is a battleground state and the GOP already has its sights set on flipping it red in 2022. We can’t let that happen! It’s critical that we hit this goal so our grassroots movement stands a chance against GOP mega-donors. | | | | | | | | | | | | Nevada Democrats fight for us every day in Washington and here at home -- and now it’s time for us to fight for them. With your help, we can go head to head with Republicans and keep them from gaining momentum. | | | | Thanks for standing with us, Elect Nevada Democrats | | If you'd like to support Elect Nevada Democrats, you can | Paid for by Home Means Nevada PAC. Elect Nevada Democrats is a project of Home Means Nevada PAC, and not authorized or paid for by a candidate for office or a committee controlled by a candidate for this office. Home Means Nevada PAC 401 S Curry St Carson City, NV 89703 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Home Means Nevada, please .
